original_query:
--funnel           단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,

        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차 미지원 m 30' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin_m30,
        max(case when title = '2차 미지원 d 1' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin_d1,
        max(case when title = '2차 미지원 d 2' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin_d2,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류 합격 d 1' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass_d1,
        max(case when title = '서류 합격 d 2' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass_d2,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '슬랙 가입 d 3' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join_d3,
        max(case when title = '슬랙 가입 d 7' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join_d7,
        max(case when title = '슬랙 가입 d 14' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join_d14,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title') 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
       case when app.precampjoininfo is null then null
        else app.precampjoininfo.canattend end as is_precamp,
        case when is_precamp = true then ''
        else app.precampjoininfo.rejectreason end as precamp_reason,
        -- case when app.precampjoininfo is null then null
        -- else to_char(date_trunc('day',app.precampjoininfo.createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') end as is_precamp_createdat,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

notification as (
SELECT 
    app._id,
    u.name,
    u.phone,
    u.birthyear,
    CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
        ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
    END AS funnel_title,
    CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
        ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
    END AS notification_round_title
    -- COALESCE(whynotification, '') AS why_notification,
    -- COALESCE(whynotificationdetail, '') AS why_notificationdetail,
    -- case when u.birthyear between 1988 and 2004 then 'target'
    -- else 'non-target'
    -- end as is_target,
    -- u.marketing
FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
inner JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
WHERE whynotification is not null
)



select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    case 
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game(Unity)'
        when round_title like '%데이터드리%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터 분석가%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(Design)'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 2회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%앱 창업(Flutter)%' then '창업(Android)'
        when round_title like '%3D%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QAQC'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    has_card,
    currentOccupation,
    first_paper_fin,
    first_paper_fin_m30,
    first_paper_fin_d1,
    first_paper_fin_d2,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_pass_d1,
    paper_pass_d2,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    slack_join_d3,
    slack_join_d7,
    slack_join_d14,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    is_precamp,
    case 
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '결제후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as reg_fin_to_cancel_app,
    CASE
        WHEN reg_fin IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL THEN
            CASE
                WHEN cancel_app::date - reg_fin::date < 3 THEN '3일 내'
                WHEN cancel_app::date - reg_fin::date BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN '3일 내 ~ 7일 내'
                WHEN cancel_app::date - reg_fin::date > 7 THEN '7일 이후'
                ELSE '기간 정보 없음'
            END
        ELSE ''
    END AS cancel_period,
    recentOrder
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%TEST%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'
and first_paper_fin is not null
and slack_join is not null
and reg_fin is not null
order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

    u_i.name,

    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin
optimized_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR as after_title,
        app_logs.beforefunnel.title::VARCHAR as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR as online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR as name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR as birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR as phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR as degree,
        app.user.hascard as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then app.apl1.referencedetail::VARCHAR
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.currentoccupation::VARCHAR end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.programminglevel::VARCHAR end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.samemajor::VARCHAR end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '[0-9]+') || '회차'
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 8회차%' then 'back_kotlin' -- 5/13(화) 추가 (수정자 : 김보경)
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/04/04' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
-- and u_i.phone = '01071972845'
order by first_paper_fin

        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 8회차%' then 'back_kotlin' -- 5/13(화) 추가 (수정자 : 김보경)
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/04/04' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
-- and u_i.phone = '01071972845'
order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '[0-9]+') || '회차'
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
),
sales_info AS (
    SELECT
        createdat,
        marketingroundtitle,
        name,
        phone,
        roundtitle,
        track
    FROM dbnbcamp_nbcamp_sales_2025
    WHERE roundtitle like '%iOS%'
    OR roundtitle like '%QA%'
    OR roundtitle like '%Unreal%'
)

        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'

where u_i.name not like '%@test%'

and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'

and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin

        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin,
    s.name AS sales_name,
    s.phone AS sales_phone,
    s.createdat AS sales_createdat,
    s.marketingroundtitle AS sales_marketingroundtitle,
    s.roundtitle AS sales_roundtitle,
    s.track AS sales_track
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
left join sales_info s
    on u_i.phone = s.phone
    
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        END AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN reference = '기타' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '[0-9]+') || '회차'
        end as round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') end as goalToAchieve,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        case when app.apl2 is null then ''
        else app.apl2.purpose end as motivation
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),
notification AS (
    SELECT 
        app._id,
        u.name,
        u.phone,
        u.birthyear,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
        END AS funnel_title,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS notification_round_title
    FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
    WHERE whynotification IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    u_i.name,
    CASE WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
    ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END AS real_age,
    u_i.phone,
        has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    u_i.motivation, -- motivation 추가
    programminglevel,
    samemajor,
    goaltoachieve,
    reference,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_상세,
    CASE 
        WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND slack_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
        WHEN (slack_join IS NOT NULL AND reg_fin IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        WHEN (reg_fin IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND reg_fin <= cancel_app) THEN '최종등록후지원철회'
    ELSE ''
    END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    ON oc.managerid = om._id
WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
-- AND u_i.degree NOT LIKE '%스파르타%'
AND first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL
AND first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    u_i.motivation, -- motivation 추가
    programminglevel,
    samemajor,
    goaltoachieve,
    reference,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_상세,
    CASE 
        WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND slack_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
        WHEN (slack_join IS NOT NULL AND reg_fin IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        WHEN (reg_fin IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND reg_fin <= cancel_app) THEN '최종등록후지원철회'
    ELSE ''
    END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    ON oc.managerid = om._id
WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
-- AND u_i.degree NOT LIKE '%스파르타%'
AND first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL
AND first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'

        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'

        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''

    IMC_fin,

        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2024/06/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin

select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 8회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2024/06/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
