inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2024/06/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin
optimized_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR as after_title,
        app_logs.beforefunnel.title::VARCHAR as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR as online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR as name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR as birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR as phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR as degree,
        app.user.hascard as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then app.apl1.referencedetail::VARCHAR
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.currentoccupation::VARCHAR end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.programminglevel::VARCHAR end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.samemajor::VARCHAR end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 8회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'Flutter'

        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'

-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2024/06/10' or IMC_fin is not null)

order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin

        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,

        else app.apl1.samemajor::VARCHAR end as sameMajor,

)

        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'

        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 8회차%' then 'back_kotlin' -- 5/13(화) 추가 (수정자 : 김보경)
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'

    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs

    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id

    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id

and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'

        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,

),

    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'

    case

        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''

    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,

from user_info u_i

    on dva._id = oc.applicantid

and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'

        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,

    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%디자이너%' then 'ai_designer'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
--and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/04' or IMC_fin is not null) --서류접수날짜기간필터제거
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin),

-- 중간 생략 --

date_union AS (
    SELECT round_name, round_number, first_paper_fin AS date, has_card, 'first_paper_fin' AS funnel, name || '_' || phone AS user_key
    FROM abs WHERE first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL AND real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 40

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, second_paper_fin, has_card, 'second_paper_fin', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE second_paper_fin IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, paper_pass, has_card, 'paper_pass', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE paper_pass IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, wait_card, has_card, 'wait_card', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE wait_card IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, wait_purchase, has_card, 'wait_purchase', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE wait_purchase IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, purchase_completed, has_card, 'purchase_completed', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE purchase_completed IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, final_join, has_card, 'final_join', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE final_join IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, cancel_app, has_card, 'cancel_app', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs 
    WHERE cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND purchase_completed IS NOT NULL
    AND purchase_completed <= cancel_app
    AND 상태 != '사전등록완료'
),

date_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        round_name,
        round_number,
        date,
        has_card,
        funnel,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_key) AS count
    FROM date_union
    GROUP BY round_name, round_number, date, has_card, funnel
)

SELECT 
    round_name,
    round_number,
    date,
    has_card,
    CASE funnel
        WHEN 'first_paper_fin' THEN '1차서류'
        WHEN 'second_paper_fin' THEN '2차서류'
        WHEN 'paper_pass' THEN '서류합격'
        WHEN 'wait_card' THEN '카드발급대기중'
        WHEN 'wait_purchase' THEN '고용센터검토중'
        WHEN 'purchase_completed' THEN '최종합격'
        WHEN 'final_join' THEN '최종합류'
        WHEN 'cancel_app' THEN '환불'
        ELSE funnel
    END AS funnel_name,
    CASE funnel
        WHEN 'first_paper_fin' THEN 1
        WHEN 'second_paper_fin' THEN 2
        WHEN 'paper_pass' THEN 3
        WHEN 'wait_card' THEN 4
        WHEN 'wait_purchase' THEN 5     
        WHEN 'purchase_completed' THEN 6
        WHEN 'final_join' THEN 7
        WHEN 'cancel_app' THEN 8
        ELSE 99
    END AS funnel_order,
    count
FROM date_summary
ORDER BY round_name, round_number, date, funnel_order;

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        END AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN reference = '기타' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS round_title,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        END AS round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') end as goalToAchieve,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        case when app.apl2 is null then ''
        else app.apl2.purpose end as motivation
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),
notification AS (
    SELECT 
        app._id,
        u.name,
        u.phone,
        u.birthyear,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
        END AS funnel_title,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS notification_round_title
    FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
    WHERE whynotification IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    u_i.name,
    CASE WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
    ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END AS real_age,
    u_i.phone,
        has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
        when round_title like '%마케팅%' then 'digital_marketer'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    u_i.motivation, -- motivation 추가
    programminglevel,
    samemajor,
    goaltoachieve,
    reference,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_상세,
    CASE 
        WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND slack_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
        WHEN (slack_join IS NOT NULL AND reg_fin IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        WHEN (reg_fin IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND reg_fin <= cancel_app) THEN '최종등록후지원철회'
    ELSE ''
    END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    ON oc.managerid = om._id
WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
-- AND u_i.degree NOT LIKE '%스파르타%'
AND first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL
AND round_name IN ('digital_marketer')
AND first_paper_fin >= '2025/11/21'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        
        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title') 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '...$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

notification as (
SELECT 
    app._id,
    u.name,
    u.phone,
    u.birthyear,
    CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
        ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
    END AS funnel_title,
    CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
        ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
    END AS notification_round_title
    -- COALESCE(whynotification, '') AS why_notification,
    -- COALESCE(whynotificationdetail, '') AS why_notificationdetail,
    -- case when u.birthyear between 1988 and 2004 then 'target'
    -- else 'non-target'
    -- end as is_target,
    -- u.marketing
FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
inner JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
WHERE whynotification is not null
)
,utm AS (
    SELECT
    utm.user_id                                                             AS user_id
    , utm.utm_created_at                                                    AS created_at
    , utm.row_num                                                           AS row_num
    , SPLIT_PART(utm.url,'?',1)                                             AS url
    , JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(utm.utm), 'utm_source', true)   AS utm_source
    , JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(utm.utm), 'utm_medium', true)   AS utm_medium
    , JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(utm.utm), 'utm_campaign', true) AS utm_campaign
    , JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(utm.utm), 'utm_term', true)     AS utm_term
    , JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(utm.utm), 'utm_content', true)  AS utm_content
    FROM datamart_users_utm utm
)

-- from datamart_users_utm

select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case 
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    pre_cancel_app,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'

        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    case when second_paper_fin is not null then extract(epoch from (to_timestamp(second_paper_fin, 'YYYY/MM/DD')- to_timestamp(first_paper_fin, 'YYYY/MM/DD - HH'))) / 3600
    else null
    end as first_to_second,
    case when slack_join is not null then extract(epoch from (to_timestamp(slack_join, 'YYYY/MM/DD - HH')- to_timestamp(paper_pass, 'YYYY/MM/DD - HH'))) / 3600
    else null
    end as paper_pass_to_slack,
    case when reg_fin is not null then extract(epoch from (to_timestamp(reg_fin, 'YYYY/MM/DD - HH')- to_timestamp(slack_join, 'YYYY/MM/DD - HH'))) / 3600
    else null
    end as slack_to_reg,
    u_utm.utm_source, 
    u_utm.utm_medium, 
    u_utm.utm_term, 
    u_utm.utm_content, 
    u_utm.utm_campaign,

    -- u_utm.seq

    --     else ''
    -- end as 배정_매니저,
    -- case
    --     when om._id is not null then to_char(date_trunc('day',om.createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd')
    --     else ''
    -- end as 배정_날짜,
    -- 'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' + u_i._id as 백오피스_링크,
    -- pre_cancel_app as 지원철회_요청일,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    -- case 
    --     when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
    --     when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
    --     when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    -- else ''
    -- end as funnel_to_cancel_app
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid

    on u_i.online_user_id = u_utm.user_id

--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
         MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '[0-9]+') || '회차'
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,

        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%' -- 1/13(월) 주석처리
-- and (first_paper_fin is not null or IMC_fin is not null) -- 03/04(화) 주석처리
--and (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/04' or IMC_fin is not null) --서류접수날짜기간필터제거
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
order by first_paper_fin),

-- 중간 생략 --

date_union AS (
    SELECT round_name, round_number, first_paper_fin AS date, has_card, 'first_paper_fin' AS funnel, name || '_' || phone AS user_key
    FROM abs WHERE first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL AND real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 40

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, second_paper_fin, has_card, 'second_paper_fin', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE second_paper_fin IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, paper_pass, has_card, 'paper_pass', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE paper_pass IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, wait_card, has_card, 'wait_card', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE wait_card IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, wait_purchase, has_card, 'wait_purchase', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE wait_purchase IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, purchase_completed, has_card, 'purchase_completed', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE purchase_completed IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, final_join, has_card, 'final_join', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs WHERE final_join IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT round_name, round_number, cancel_app, has_card, 'cancel_app', name || '_' || phone
    FROM abs 
    WHERE cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND purchase_completed IS NOT NULL
    AND purchase_completed <= cancel_app
    AND 상태 != '사전등록완료'
),

date_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        round_name,
        round_number,
        date,
        has_card,
        funnel,
        COUNT(DISTINCT user_key) AS count
    FROM date_union
    GROUP BY round_name, round_number, date, has_card, funnel
)

SELECT 
    round_name,
    round_number,
    date,
    has_card,
    CASE funnel
        WHEN 'first_paper_fin' THEN '1차서류'
        WHEN 'second_paper_fin' THEN '2차서류'
        WHEN 'paper_pass' THEN '서류합격'
        WHEN 'wait_card' THEN '카드발급대기중'
        WHEN 'wait_purchase' THEN '고용센터검토중'
        WHEN 'purchase_completed' THEN '최종합격'
        WHEN 'final_join' THEN '최종합류'
        WHEN 'cancel_app' THEN '환불'
        ELSE funnel
    END AS funnel_name,
    CASE funnel
        WHEN 'first_paper_fin' THEN 1
        WHEN 'second_paper_fin' THEN 2
        WHEN 'paper_pass' THEN 3
        WHEN 'wait_card' THEN 4
        WHEN 'wait_purchase' THEN 5     
        WHEN 'purchase_completed' THEN 6
        WHEN 'final_join' THEN 7
        WHEN 'cancel_app' THEN 8
        ELSE 99
    END AS funnel_order,
    count
FROM date_summary
ORDER BY round_name, round_number, date, funnel_order;

        WHEN 'wait_purchase' THEN '고용센터검토중'
        WHEN 'purchase_completed' THEN '최종합격'
        WHEN 'final_join' THEN '최종합류'
        WHEN 'cancel_app' THEN '환불'
        ELSE funnel
    END AS funnel_name,

with raw_funnel_logs as (

        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,

        max(case when title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,

original_query:
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') AS after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') AS before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류보류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_wait,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '면접합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS interview_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '사전캠프 참여' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS precamp_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '면접불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS interview_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회 요청' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS pre_cancel_app,

        -- 새로 추가된 컬럼
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY applicantid
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') = '기타' 
            THEN json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        marketingroundtitle AS round_title,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$') AS round_number,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') AS currentOccupation,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') AS programmingLevel,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'designlevel') AS designlevel,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') AS sameMajor,
        app.user.recentorder.course_title AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl2 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE app.apl2.purpose 
        END AS motivation -- ✅ 여기서 motivation 추가!
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
SELECT
    u_i.name,
    CASE 
        WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
        ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 
    END AS real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    CASE
        WHEN round_title LIKE '%데이터 분석가 양성과정 7회차' THEN 'data'
        ELSE '미정'
    END AS round_name,
    motivation, -- ✅ 여기서도 motivation 추가!

    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    cancel_app,
    -- 삭제된 컬럼: slack_join, no_card_reg_fin, reg_fin

    -- 새로 추가된 컬럼
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,

    CASE 
        WHEN real_age <= 20 THEN '10대'
        WHEN real_age <= 25 THEN '25세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 28 THEN '28세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 30 THEN '30세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 33 THEN '33세이하'
        ELSE '34세이상'
    END AS age_category,
    json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(dva.funnel), 'title') AS 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    designlevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
WHERE 
    (round_title LIKE '%데이터%')
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
    AND first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL
    AND first_paper_fin >= '2025/01/01'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '면접불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS interview_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회 요청' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS pre_cancel_app,

        -- 새로 추가된 컬럼
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY applicantid
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        _id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR AS online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR AS name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR AS birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR AS phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR AS degree,
        app.user.hascard AS has_card,
        app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR = '기타' 
            THEN app.apl1.referencedetail::VARCHAR
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        marketingroundtitle AS round_title,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$') AS round_number,
        app.apl1.currentoccupation::VARCHAR AS currentOccupation,
        app.apl1.programminglevel::VARCHAR AS programmingLevel,
        app.apl1.designlevel::VARCHAR AS designlevel,
        app.apl1.samemajor::VARCHAR AS sameMajor,
        app.user.recentorder.course_title AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl2 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE app.apl2.purpose 
        END AS motivation -- ✅ 여기서 motivation 추가!
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
SELECT
    u_i.name,
    CASE 
        WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
        ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 
    END AS real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    CASE
        WHEN round_title LIKE '%데이터 분석가 양성과정 7회차' THEN 'data'
        ELSE '미정'
    END AS round_name,
    motivation, -- ✅ 여기서도 motivation 추가!

    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    cancel_app,
    -- 삭제된 컬럼: slack_join, no_card_reg_fin, reg_fin

    -- 새로 추가된 컬럼
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,

    CASE 
        WHEN real_age <= 20 THEN '10대'
        WHEN real_age <= 25 THEN '25세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 28 THEN '28세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 30 THEN '30세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 33 THEN '33세이하'
        ELSE '34세이상'
    END AS age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::VARCHAR AS 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    designlevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
WHERE 
    (round_title LIKE '%데이터%')
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
    AND first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL
    AND first_paper_fin >= '2025/01/01'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

-- 🔧 수정: phone, email 모두 추가
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        app.user.email AS email,
        app.marketingroundtitle
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

user_signup_info AS (
    SELECT 
        _id AS online_user_id,
        created_at AS signup_at,
        TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS signup_ymd
    FROM dbonline_v2_users
    WHERE __hevo__marked_deleted = false
      AND created_at IS NOT NULL
      AND NVL(is_test, false) = false
),

deduplicated_content_data AS (
    SELECT
        log._id AS video_id,
        log.created_at AS content_createdat,
        log.user_id AS online_user_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN log.data IS NOT NULL
            THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(log.data), 'log_title')
            ELSE NULL
        END AS content_title,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY log.created_at, log.user_id, log._id
            ORDER BY log.created_at DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM logs_logs_prod log
    WHERE log.key = 'nbc_contents_mainpage_trackpopup_view'
),

content_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM deduplicated_content_data
    WHERE row_num = 1
),

user_content_count AS (
    SELECT 
        u_i.name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.content_title) AS content_count
    FROM content_data c
    LEFT JOIN user_info u_i ON c.online_user_id = u_i.online_user_id
    LEFT JOIN user_signup_info u_s ON u_i.online_user_id = u_s.online_user_id
    WHERE c.content_title IS NOT NULL 
      AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
      AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
      AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
      AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%홍상명%'
      AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%teamsparta%'
      AND u_s.signup_at >= '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY u_i.name
),

filtered_final AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY name, content_title
            ORDER BY content_createdat DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.content_createdat,
            u_s.signup_at,
            u_s.signup_ymd,
            u_i.name,
            u_i.birthday,
            u_i.phone,
            u_i.email,
            c.content_title,
            uc.content_count,
            CASE
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('NCSOFT 백엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', 'Backend 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'backend'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 iOS 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'ios'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('PM 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'pm'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('웹개발 Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100', 'Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100선', 'UX/UI 면접 예상 질문 100선', '토스 프론트엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', '쿠팡 프로덕트 디자이너 합격 이력서') THEN 'uxui'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('카카오 데이터 분석가 합격 이력서', '데이터 분석 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'data'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 Android 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'android'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('베이글코드 게임 기획자 합격 이력서', 'LG U+ 게임 개발자 합격 이력서', '게임 개발 면접 예상 질문 100선', '게임 기획 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'game'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('QA 엔지니어 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'qa'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS related_track,
            u_i.marketingroundtitle,
            u_f.first_paper_fin,
            u_f.second_paper_fin,
            u_f.paper_pass,
            u_f.paper_wait,
            u_f.paper_fail,
            u_f.cancel_app,
            u_f.wait_purchase,
            u_f.wait_card,
            u_f.purchase_completed,
            u_f.final_join,
            app.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태
        FROM content_data c
        LEFT JOIN user_info u_i ON c.online_user_id = u_i.online_user_id
        LEFT JOIN user_funnel_logs u_f ON u_i._id = u_f.applicantid
        LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app ON u_i._id = app._id
        LEFT JOIN user_signup_info u_s ON u_i.online_user_id = u_s.online_user_id
        LEFT JOIN user_content_count uc ON u_i.name = uc.name
        WHERE c.content_createdat IS NOT NULL
          AND c.content_title IS NOT NULL 
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%홍상명%'
          AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%teamsparta%'
          AND u_s.signup_at >= '2023-01-01'
    ) t
)

SELECT *
FROM filtered_final
WHERE row_num = 1
ORDER BY content_createdat DESC;
