original_query:
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') AS after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title,
        app_logs.manager
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN manager END) AS first_paper_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN manager END) AS second_paper_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류보류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS paper_wait,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류보류' THEN manager END) AS paper_wait_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN manager END) AS paper_pass_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS paper_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN manager END) AS paper_fail_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN manager END) AS wait_purchase_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN manager END) AS wait_card_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN manager END) AS purchase_completed_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN manager END) AS final_join_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS cancel_app,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN manager END) AS cancel_app_manager
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

-- 기존 user_info, notification, sales_info, real_sales_info CTE 생략 (기존과 동일)
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        END AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN reference = '기타' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS round_title,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        END AS round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') end as goalToAchieve,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'painpoint') end as painPoint,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'needs') end as needs,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        case when app.apl2 is null then ''
        else app.apl2.purpose end as motivation
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

notification AS (
    SELECT 
        app._id,
        u.name,
        u.phone,
        u.birthyear,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
        END AS funnel_title,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS notification_round_title
    FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
    WHERE whynotification IS NOT NULL
),

real_sales_info AS (
    SELECT
        createdat,
        name,
        phone,
        track,
        roundtitle,
        marketingroundtitle
    FROM dbnbcamp_nbcamp_sales
    WHERE name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%test%'
)

-- 이하 최종 SELECT 쿼리에서 필요한 manager 칼럼 추가:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        u_i.name,
        u_i._id AS onlineUserId,
        u.created_at AS 회원가입일자,
        CASE WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
            ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END AS real_age,
        case 
            when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
            when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
            when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
            when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
            when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
        else '34세이상'
        end as age_category,
        u_i.phone,
        rs.phone AS real_sales_phone,
        has_card,
        u.marketing,
        case
            when round_title is null then null
            when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
            when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
            when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
            when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
            when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
            when round_title like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
            when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
            when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
            when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
            when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
            when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
            when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
            when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
            when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
            when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
            when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
            when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
            when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
            when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
            when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
            else '미정'
        end as round_name,
        round_number,
        dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
        u_i.motivation,
        currentOccupation,
        programminglevel,
        painPoint,
        needs,
        goalToAchieve,
        sameMajor,
        first_paper_fin,
        -- first_paper_manager,
        second_paper_fin,
        -- second_paper_manager,
        paper_pass,
        paper_pass_manager,
        paper_fail,
        -- paper_fail_manager,
        wait_purchase,
        -- wait_purchase_manager,
        wait_card,
        -- wait_card_manager,
        purchase_completed,
        -- purchase_completed_manager,
        final_join,
        -- final_join_manager,
        cancel_app,
        -- cancel_app_manager,
        CASE 
            WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
            ELSE ''
        END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
        CASE 
            WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
            ELSE ''
        END AS 지원철회_상세,
        CASE 
            WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
            WHEN (purchase_completed IS NOT NULL AND final_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '최종합격후지원철회'
            WHEN (final_join IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND final_join <= cancel_app) THEN '최종합류후지원철회'
        ELSE ''
        END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
        reference,
        recentOrder,
        u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
        rs.createdat AS real_sales_createdat,
        rs.marketingroundtitle AS real_sales_marketingroundtitle,
        rs.name AS real_sales_name,
        rs.roundtitle AS real_sales_roundtitle,
        rs.track AS real_sales_track,
        'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u_i._id ORDER BY first_paper_fin) AS rn
    FROM user_info u_i
    INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
        ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
    INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
        ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
        ON u_i._id = dva._id
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
        ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
        ON oc.managerid = om._id
    LEFT JOIN real_sales_info rs
        ON u_i.phone = rs.phone
    WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co%'
    AND (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20')
    AND COALESCE(dva.funnel.title, '') != '무효화'
    AND (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is NULL OR u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is FALSE)
) subquery
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR AS after_title,
        app_logs.beforefunnel.title::VARCHAR as before_title,
        app_logs.manager
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN manager END) AS first_paper_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS paper_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN manager END) AS paper_fail_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN manager END) AS wait_purchase_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN manager END) AS wait_card_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN manager END) AS purchase_completed_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN manager END) AS final_join_manager,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') END) AS cancel_app,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN manager END) AS cancel_app_manager
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u_i._id ORDER BY first_paper_fin) AS rn
    FROM user_info u_i
    INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
        ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
    INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
        ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
        ON u_i._id = dva._id
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
        ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
        ON oc.managerid = om._id
    LEFT JOIN real_sales_info rs
        ON u_i.phone = rs.phone
    WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co%'
    AND (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20')
    AND COALESCE(dva.funnel.title, '') != '무효화'
    AND (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is NULL OR u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is FALSE)
) subquery
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

original_query:
-- funnel 단계 추출 및 회원가입일 포함
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        app.user.email AS email,
        app.marketingroundtitle,
        app.whynotification
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

user_signup_info AS (
    SELECT 
        _id AS online_user_id,
        created_at AS signup_at,
        TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS signup_ymd
    FROM dbonline_v2_users
    WHERE __hevo__marked_deleted = false
      AND created_at IS NOT NULL
      AND NVL(is_test, false) = false
),

deduplicated_content_data AS (
    SELECT
        log._id AS video_id,
        log.created_at AS content_createdat,
        log.user_id AS online_user_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN log.data IS NOT NULL
            THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(log.data), 'log_title')
            ELSE NULL
        END AS content_title,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY log.created_at, log.user_id, log._id
            ORDER BY log.created_at DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM logs_logs_prod log
    WHERE log.key = 'nbc_contents_mainpage_trackpopup_view'
),

content_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM deduplicated_content_data
    WHERE row_num = 1
),

filtered_final AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY name
            ORDER BY content_createdat DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.content_createdat,
            u_s.signup_at,
            u_s.signup_ymd,
            u_i.name,
            u_i.birthday,
            c.content_title,
            CASE
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('NCSOFT 백엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', 'Backend 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'backend'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 iOS 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'ios'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('PM 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'pm'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('웹개발 Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100', 'Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100선', 'UX/UI 면접 예상 질문 100선', '토스 프론트엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', '쿠팡 프로덕트 디자이너 합격 이력서') THEN 'uxui'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('카카오 데이터 분석가 합격 이력서', '데이터 분석 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'data'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 Android 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'android'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('베이글코드 게임 기획자 합격 이력서', 'LG U+ 게임 개발자 합격 이력서', '게임 개발 면접 예상 질문 100선', '게임 기획 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'game'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('QA 엔지니어 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'qa'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS related_track,
            u_i.phone,
            u_i.email,
            u_i.marketingroundtitle,
            u_f.first_paper_fin,
            u_f.second_paper_fin,
            u_f.paper_pass,
            u_f.paper_wait,
            u_f.paper_fail,
            u_f.cancel_app,
            u_f.purchase_completed,
            u_f.final_join,
            app.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
            NULL AS video_url
        FROM content_data c
        LEFT JOIN user_info u_i ON c.online_user_id = u_i.online_user_id
        LEFT JOIN user_funnel_logs u_f ON u_i._id = u_f.applicantid
        LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app ON u_i._id = app._id
        LEFT JOIN user_signup_info u_s ON u_i.online_user_id = u_s.online_user_id
        WHERE c.content_createdat IS NOT NULL
          AND c.content_title IS NOT NULL 
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%홍상명%'
          AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%teamsparta%'
          AND u_s.signup_at >= '2023-01-01' -- ✅ 가입 시점 필터링
    ) t
)

SELECT *
FROM filtered_final
WHERE row_num = 1
ORDER BY content_createdat DESC;

original_query:
WITH TilSummary AS (
    -- 전체 TIL 제출 건수 집계
    SELECT 
        "applicantId",
        "roundId",
        COUNT("url") AS total_tils
    FROM "dbnbcamp_tils"
    GROUP BY "applicantId", "roundId"
),
LatestFunnelStatus AS (
    -- 가장 최근 전형 및 퍼널 상태 (JSON에서 title을 텍스트로 추출)
    SELECT "applicantId", current_funnel_status, "manager"
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            applicantId AS "applicantId",
            json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(afterfunnel), 'title') AS current_funnel_status,
            manager,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY applicantId ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC) AS rn
        FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs
        WHERE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(afterfunnel), 'title') IN (
            '결제완료',
            '선발완료',
            '최종합격',
            '최종합류',
            '최종합류 d1',
            '지원철회'
        )
    ) sub
    WHERE rn = 1
),
FinalJoinDate AS (
    -- 최종합류(또는 최종합류 D1) 퍼널이 찍힌 시점
    SELECT
        "applicantId",
        MAX("createdAt") AS final_join_at
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs
    WHERE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(afterfunnel), 'title') IN ('최종합류', '최종합류 d1')
    GROUP BY "applicantId"
),
CancelDate AS (
    -- 지원철회 퍼널이 찍힌 시점
    SELECT
        "applicantId",
        MAX("createdAt") AS cancel_app_at
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs
    WHERE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(afterfunnel), 'title') = '지원철회'
    GROUP BY "applicantId"
),
AttendSummary AS (
    -- 전체 기간 입실/퇴실 횟수 + 최근 5일(평일 가정) 입실 횟수
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "rtype" = '입실' THEN 1 END) AS total_check_ins,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "rtype" = '퇴실' THEN 1 END) AS total_check_outs,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "rtype" = '입실' AND "created_at"::timestamp >= current_date - interval '5 days' THEN 1 END) AS weekly_check_ins
    FROM dbonline_v2_gov_attend_records
    GROUP BY user_id
)

SELECT 
    -- 지원자 기본 정보 (user는 super일 가능성 높아서 텍스트 추출로 교체)
    A._id AS applicant_id,
    json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(A."user"), 'name')  AS name,
    json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(A."user"), 'email') AS email,
    json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(A."user"), 'phone') AS phone,
    A.marketingRoundTitle AS MRT,

    -- 기수/코스 정보 및 주요 지표
    R."title" AS course_title,
    R.trackType AS track_type,
    LF.current_funnel_status,

    -- 퍼널 일자
    FJ.final_join_at,
    CD.cancel_app_at,

    -- 캠프 진행도
    GREATEST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (CURRENT_DATE - R."startDate"::timestamp)), 1) AS days_since_start,

    -- TIL 제출률
    COALESCE(T.total_tils, 0) AS total_tils,
    ROUND(
      (COALESCE(T.total_tils, 0)::numeric 
        / GREATEST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (CURRENT_DATE - R."startDate"::timestamp)), 1)::numeric
      ), 
      1
    ) AS "til제출율",

    -- 전체 & 주간 출석률
    COALESCE(G.total_check_ins, 0) AS "total_attend_count",
    COALESCE(G.weekly_check_ins, 0) AS weekly_attend_count,
    ROUND((COALESCE(G.weekly_check_ins, 0)::numeric / 5.0) * 100, 1) AS "weekly출결율",

    -- 출결 현황
    COALESCE(G.total_check_ins, 0) AS total_check_ins,
    COALESCE(G.total_check_outs, 0) AS total_check_outs

FROM "dbnbcamp_applicants" A
INNER JOIN LatestFunnelStatus LF 
        ON A."_id" = LF."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN FinalJoinDate FJ
       ON A."_id" = FJ."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN CancelDate CD
       ON A."_id" = CD."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN TilSummary T 
       ON A."_id" = T."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds R 
       ON T.roundId = R."_id"
LEFT JOIN AttendSummary G 
       ON A.user.onlineUserId = G."user_id"

WHERE 1=1
  AND FJ.final_join_at IS NOT NULL
  AND FJ.final_join_at >= '2026-01-01'
;
optimized_query:
WITH TilSummary AS (
    -- 전체 TIL 제출 건수 집계
    SELECT 
        "applicantId",
        "roundId",
        COUNT("url") AS total_tils
    FROM "dbnbcamp_tils"
    GROUP BY "applicantId", "roundId"
),
LatestFunnelStatus AS (
    -- 가장 최근 전형 및 퍼널 상태 (JSON에서 title을 텍스트로 추출)
    SELECT "applicantId", current_funnel_status, "manager"
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            applicantId AS "applicantId",
            afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR AS current_funnel_status,
            manager,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY applicantId ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC) AS rn
        FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs
        WHERE afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR IN (
            '결제완료',
            '선발완료',
            '최종합격',
            '최종합류',
            '최종합류 d1',
            '지원철회'
        )
    ) sub
    WHERE rn = 1
),
FinalJoinDate AS (
    -- 최종합류(또는 최종합류 D1) 퍼널이 찍힌 시점
    SELECT
        "applicantId",
        MAX("createdAt") AS final_join_at
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs
    WHERE afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR IN ('최종합류', '최종합류 d1')
    GROUP BY "applicantId"
),
CancelDate AS (
    -- 지원철회 퍼널이 찍힌 시점
    SELECT
        "applicantId",
        MAX("createdAt") AS cancel_app_at
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs
    WHERE afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR = '지원철회'
    GROUP BY "applicantId"
),
AttendSummary AS (
    -- 전체 기간 입실/퇴실 횟수 + 최근 5일(평일 가정) 입실 횟수
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "rtype" = '입실' THEN 1 END) AS total_check_ins,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "rtype" = '퇴실' THEN 1 END) AS total_check_outs,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "rtype" = '입실' AND "created_at"::timestamp >= current_date - interval '5 days' THEN 1 END) AS weekly_check_ins
    FROM dbonline_v2_gov_attend_records
    GROUP BY user_id
)

SELECT 
    -- 지원자 기본 정보 (user는 super일 가능성 높아서 텍스트 추출로 교체)
    A._id AS applicant_id,
    A.user.name::VARCHAR  AS name,
    A.user.email::VARCHAR AS email,
    A.user.phone::VARCHAR AS phone,
    A.marketingRoundTitle AS MRT,

    -- 기수/코스 정보 및 주요 지표
    R."title" AS course_title,
    R.trackType AS track_type,
    LF.current_funnel_status,

    -- 퍼널 일자
    FJ.final_join_at,
    CD.cancel_app_at,

    -- 캠프 진행도
    GREATEST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (CURRENT_DATE - R."startDate"::timestamp)), 1) AS days_since_start,

    -- TIL 제출률
    COALESCE(T.total_tils, 0) AS total_tils,
    ROUND(
      (COALESCE(T.total_tils, 0)::numeric 
        / GREATEST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (CURRENT_DATE - R."startDate"::timestamp)), 1)::numeric
      ), 
      1
    ) AS "til제출율",

    -- 전체 & 주간 출석률
    COALESCE(G.total_check_ins, 0) AS "total_attend_count",
    COALESCE(G.weekly_check_ins, 0) AS weekly_attend_count,
    ROUND((COALESCE(G.weekly_check_ins, 0)::numeric / 5.0) * 100, 1) AS "weekly출결율",

    -- 출결 현황
    COALESCE(G.total_check_ins, 0) AS total_check_ins,
    COALESCE(G.total_check_outs, 0) AS total_check_outs

FROM "dbnbcamp_applicants" A
INNER JOIN LatestFunnelStatus LF 
        ON A."_id" = LF."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN FinalJoinDate FJ
       ON A."_id" = FJ."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN CancelDate CD
       ON A."_id" = CD."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN TilSummary T 
       ON A."_id" = T."applicantId"
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds R 
       ON T.roundId = R."_id"
LEFT JOIN AttendSummary G 
       ON A.user.onlineUserId = G."user_id"

WHERE 1=1
  AND FJ.final_join_at IS NOT NULL
  AND FJ.final_join_at >= '2026-01-01'
;

--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (

        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title') 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '...$')
        end as round_number,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    -- degree,
    -- reference,
    -- referenceDetail,
    has_card,
    case 
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'iOS'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'Android'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'React'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'Spring'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'Node'
        when round_title like '%AI%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'Data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    -- app_start,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    -- call_interview,
    -- interview_fin,
    -- interview_pass,
    -- interview_fail,
    -- hrd_reg_fin,
    slack_join,
    precamp_join,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    interview_pass,
    -- round_title,
    round_number,
    u.marketing
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'
and first_paper_fin is not null
order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
-- funnel 단계 추출
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

-- 유저 정보
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        app.user.email AS email,
        app.marketingroundtitle,
        app.whynotification
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

-- 콘텐츠 로그 deduplication
deduplicated_content_data AS (
    SELECT
        log._id AS video_id,
        log.created_at AS content_createdat,
        log.user_id AS online_user_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN log.data IS NOT NULL
            THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(log.data), 'log_title')
            ELSE NULL
        END AS content_title,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY log.created_at, log.user_id, log._id
            ORDER BY log.created_at DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM logs_logs_prod log
    WHERE log.key = 'nbc_contents_mainpage_trackpopup_view'
),

content_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM deduplicated_content_data
    WHERE row_num = 1
),

-- 중복 제거 (name 기준)
filtered_final AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY name
            ORDER BY content_createdat DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.video_id,
            c.content_createdat,
            u_i.name,
            u_i.birthday,
            c.content_title,
            CASE
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('NCSOFT 백엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', 'Backend 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'backend'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 iOS 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'ios'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('PM 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'pm'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('웹개발 Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100', 'Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100선', 'UX/UI 면접 예상 질문 100선', '토스 프론트엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', '쿠팡 프로덕트 디자이너 합격 이력서') THEN 'uxui'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('카카오 데이터 분석가 합격 이력서', '데이터 분석 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'data'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 Android 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'android'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('베이글코드 게임 기획자 합격 이력서', 'LG U+ 게임 개발자 합격 이력서', '게임 개발 면접 예상 질문 100선', '게임 기획 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'game'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('QA 엔지니어 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'qa'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS related_track,
            u_i.phone,
            u_i.has_card,
            u_i.email,
            u_i.marketingroundtitle,
            u_f.first_paper_fin,
            u_f.second_paper_fin,
            u_f.paper_pass,
            u_f.paper_wait,
            u_f.paper_fail,
            u_f.cancel_app,
            u_f.wait_purchase,
            u_f.wait_card,
            u_f.purchase_completed,
            u_f.final_join,
            app.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
            NULL AS video_url
        FROM content_data c
        LEFT JOIN user_info u_i ON c.online_user_id = u_i.online_user_id
        LEFT JOIN user_funnel_logs u_f ON u_i._id = u_f.applicantid
        LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app ON u_i._id = app._id
        WHERE c.content_createdat IS NOT NULL

          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'

          -- AND related_track LIKE 'game' -- 추출 원하는 트랙 여기서 설정
    ) t
)

WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR as after_title,
        app_logs.beforefunnel.title::VARCHAR as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

-- 유저 정보
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR AS online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR AS name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR AS birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR AS phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR AS degree,
        app.user.hascard AS has_card,
        app.user.email AS email,
        app.marketingroundtitle,
        app.whynotification
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

-- 콘텐츠 로그 deduplication
deduplicated_content_data AS (
    SELECT
        log._id AS video_id,
        log.created_at AS content_createdat,
        log.user_id AS online_user_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN log.data IS NOT NULL
            THEN log.data.log_title::VARCHAR
            ELSE NULL
        END AS content_title,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY log.created_at, log.user_id, log._id
            ORDER BY log.created_at DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM logs_logs_prod log
    WHERE log.key = 'nbc_contents_mainpage_trackpopup_view'
),

content_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM deduplicated_content_data
    WHERE row_num = 1
),

-- 중복 제거 (name 기준)
filtered_final AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY name
            ORDER BY content_createdat DESC
        ) AS row_num
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.video_id,
            c.content_createdat,
            u_i.name,
            u_i.birthday,
            c.content_title,
            CASE
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('NCSOFT 백엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', 'Backend 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'backend'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 iOS 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'ios'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('PM 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'pm'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('웹개발 Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100', 'Frontend 면접 예상 질문 100선', 'UX/UI 면접 예상 질문 100선', '토스 프론트엔드 개발자 합격 이력서', '쿠팡 프로덕트 디자이너 합격 이력서') THEN 'uxui'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('카카오 데이터 분석가 합격 이력서', '데이터 분석 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'data'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('앱개발 Android 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'android'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('베이글코드 게임 기획자 합격 이력서', 'LG U+ 게임 개발자 합격 이력서', '게임 개발 면접 예상 질문 100선', '게임 기획 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'game'
                WHEN c.content_title IN ('QA 엔지니어 면접 예상 질문 100선') THEN 'qa'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS related_track,
            u_i.phone,
            u_i.has_card,
            u_i.email,
            u_i.marketingroundtitle,
            u_f.first_paper_fin,
            u_f.second_paper_fin,
            u_f.paper_pass,
            u_f.paper_wait,
            u_f.paper_fail,
            u_f.cancel_app,
            u_f.wait_purchase,
            u_f.wait_card,
            u_f.purchase_completed,
            u_f.final_join,
            app.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
            NULL AS video_url
        FROM content_data c
        LEFT JOIN user_info u_i ON c.online_user_id = u_i.online_user_id
        LEFT JOIN user_funnel_logs u_f ON u_i._id = u_f.applicantid
        LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app ON u_i._id = app._id
        WHERE c.content_createdat IS NOT NULL
          AND c.content_title IS NOT NULL 
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
          AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%홍상명%'
          AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%teamsparta%'
          -- AND u_f.final_join IS NULL -- 최종합류 이력 있는 모수 제외 
          -- AND related_track LIKE 'game' -- 추출 원하는 트랙 여기서 설정
    ) t
)

-- 최종 출력
SELECT *
FROM filtered_final
WHERE row_num = 1
ORDER BY content_createdat DESC;

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '면접불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS interview_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회 요청' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS pre_cancel_app,

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,

    FROM raw_funnel_logs

),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,

        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'designlevel') AS designlevel,

    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
SELECT
    u_i.name,
    CASE 
        WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
        ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 
    END AS real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    CASE
        WHEN round_title LIKE '%UX%' THEN 'UXUI'
        ELSE '미정'
    END AS round_name,
    motivation, -- ✅ 여기서도 motivation 추가!

    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    cancel_app,
    -- 삭제된 컬럼: slack_join, no_card_reg_fin, reg_fin

    -- 새로 추가된 컬럼
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,

    CASE 
        WHEN real_age <= 20 THEN '10대'
        WHEN real_age <= 25 THEN '25세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 28 THEN '28세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 30 THEN '30세이하'
        WHEN real_age <= 33 THEN '33세이하'
        ELSE '34세이상'
    END AS age_category,
    json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(dva.funnel), 'title') AS 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    programmingLevel,
    designlevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
WHERE 
    (round_title LIKE '%UX%')
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
    AND first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL
    AND first_paper_fin >= '2024/12/01'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),

user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        END AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN reference = '기타' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS round_title,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        END AS round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') end as goalToAchieve,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'painpoint') end as painPoint,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'needs') end as needs,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        case when app.apl2 is null then ''
        else app.apl2.purpose end as motivation
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),

notification AS (
    SELECT 
        app._id,
        u.name,
        u.phone,
        u.birthyear,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
        END AS funnel_title,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS notification_round_title
    FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
    WHERE whynotification IS NOT NULL
),

sales_info AS (
    SELECT
        createdat,
        name,
        phone,
        track,
        roundtitle,
        marketingroundtitle
    FROM dbnbcamp_nbcamp_sales_2025
    WHERE name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%test%'
),

real_sales_info AS (
    SELECT
        createdat,
        name,
        phone,
        track,
        roundtitle,
        marketingroundtitle
    FROM dbnbcamp_nbcamp_sales
    WHERE name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%test%'
)

SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        u_i.name,
        u_i._id AS onlineUserId,
        u.created_at AS 회원가입일자,
        CASE WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
            ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END AS real_age,
        case 
            when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
            when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
            when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
            when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
            when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
        else '34세이상'
        end as age_category,
        u_i.phone,
        s.phone AS sales_phone,
        rs.phone AS real_sales_phone,
        has_card,
        u.marketing,
        case
            when round_title is null then null
            when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
            when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
            when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
            when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
            when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
            when round_title like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
            when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
            when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
            when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
            when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
            when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
            when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
            when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
            when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
            when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
            when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
            when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
            when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
            when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
            when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
            else '미정'
        end as round_name,
        round_number,
        dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
        u_i.motivation,
        currentOccupation,
        programminglevel,
        painPoint,
        needs,
        goalToAchieve,
        sameMajor,
        first_paper_fin,
        second_paper_fin,
        paper_pass,
        paper_fail,
        wait_purchase,
        wait_card,
        purchase_completed,
        final_join,
        cancel_app,
        CASE 
            WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
            ELSE ''
        END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
        CASE 
            WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
            ELSE ''
        END AS 지원철회_상세,
        CASE 
            WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
            WHEN (purchase_completed IS NOT NULL AND final_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '최종합격후지원철회'
            WHEN (final_join IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND final_join <= cancel_app) THEN '최종합류후지원철회'
        ELSE ''
        END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
        reference,
        recentOrder,
        u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
        s.createdat AS sales_createdat,
        s.marketingroundtitle AS sales_marketingroundtitle,
        s.name AS sales_name,
        s.roundtitle AS sales_roundtitle,
        s.track AS real_sales_track,
        rs.createdat AS real_sales_createdat,
        rs.marketingroundtitle AS real_sales_marketingroundtitle,
        rs.name AS real_sales_name,
        rs.roundtitle AS real_sales_roundtitle,
        rs.track AS real_sales_track,
        'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u_i._id ORDER BY first_paper_fin) AS rn
    FROM user_info u_i
    INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
        ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
    INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
        ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
        ON u_i._id = dva._id
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
        ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
        ON oc.managerid = om._id
    LEFT JOIN sales_info s
        ON u_i.phone = s.phone
    LEFT JOIN real_sales_info rs
        ON u_i.phone = rs.phone
    WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com%'
    AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co%'
    AND (first_paper_fin >= '2025/02/20')
    AND COALESCE(dva.funnel.title, '') != '무효화'
    AND (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is NULL OR u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is FALSE)
) subquery
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

-- funnel 단계 추출
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') AS after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app
        -- MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        END AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN reference = '기타' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS round_title,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        END AS round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') end as goalToAchieve,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'painpoint') end as painPoint,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'needs') end as needs,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        case when app.apl2 is null then ''
        else app.apl2.purpose end as motivation
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),
notification AS (
    SELECT 
        app._id,
        u.name,
        u.phone,
        u.birthyear,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
        END AS funnel_title,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS notification_round_title
    FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
    WHERE whynotification IS NOT NULL
),
sales_info AS (
    SELECT
        createdat,
        marketingroundtitle,
        name,
        phone,
        roundtitle,
        track
    FROM dbnbcamp_nbcamp_sales_2025
    where createdat >= '2025/04/13'
    AND roundtitle like '%iOS%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%test%'
)

SELECT
    u_i.name,
    u_i._id AS onlineUserId,
    CASE WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
    ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END AS real_age,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    u_i.phone,
    s.phone AS sales_phone,
    has_card,
    u.marketing,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
    u_i.motivation,
    currentOccupation,
    programminglevel,
    painPoint,
    needs,
    goalToAchieve,
    sameMajor,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_fail,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    cancel_app,
    -- IMC_fin,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_상세,
    CASE 
        WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
        WHEN (purchase_completed IS NOT NULL AND final_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '최종합격후지원철회'
        WHEN (final_join IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND final_join <= cancel_app) THEN '최종합류후지원철회'
    ELSE ''
    END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크,
    s.createdat AS sales_createdat,
    s.marketingroundtitle AS sales_marketingroundtitle,
    s.name AS sales_name,
    s.roundtitle AS sales_roundtitle,
    s.track AS sales_track
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    ON oc.managerid = om._id
LEFT JOIN sales_info s
    ON u_i.phone = s.phone    

WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
AND round_name IN ('ios_starter')
AND round_number IN ('7회차')
AND (first_paper_fin >= '2025/03/31') -- or IMC_fin is not null)
AND COALESCE(dva.funnel.title, '') != '무효화'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title') 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '...$')
        end as round_number,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
select
    u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    u_i.email::varchar,
    degree,
    -- reference,
    -- referenceDetail,
    has_card,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    -- app_start, -- 지원 시작
    first_paper_fin, -- 1차 서류 완료
    second_paper_fin, -- 2차 서류 완료
    paper_pass, -- 서류 합격
    paper_wait, -- 서류 보류
    paper_fail, -- 서류 불합격
    -- call_interview, -- 전화 인터뷰
    -- interview_fin, -- 영상 인터뷰 완료
    -- interview_pass, -- 영상 인터뷰 합격
    -- interview_fail, -- 영상 인터뷰 불합격
    -- hrd_reg_fin, -- HRD 등록 완료
    slack_join, -- 슬랙가입완료
    precamp_join, -- 사전캠프 참여
    reg_fin, -- HRD등록완료
    cancel_app, -- 지원 철회
    -- case 
    --     when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
    --     when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
    --     when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
    --     when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
    --     when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    -- else '34세이상'
    -- end as age_category,
    -- interview_pass,
    -- round_title,
    -- u.marketing,
    dva.updatedat as 수정일시
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id    
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'

--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR as online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR as name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR as birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR as phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR as degree,
        app.user.hascard as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then app.apl1.referencedetail::VARCHAR
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else app.round.title::VARCHAR 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(app.round.title::VARCHAR, '...$')
        end as round_number,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
select
    u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    u_i.email::varchar,
    degree,
    -- reference,
    -- referenceDetail,
    has_card,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    -- app_start, -- 지원 시작
    first_paper_fin, -- 1차 서류 완료
    second_paper_fin, -- 2차 서류 완료
    paper_pass, -- 서류 합격
    paper_wait, -- 서류 보류
    paper_fail, -- 서류 불합격
    -- call_interview, -- 전화 인터뷰
    -- interview_fin, -- 영상 인터뷰 완료
    -- interview_pass, -- 영상 인터뷰 합격
    -- interview_fail, -- 영상 인터뷰 불합격
    -- hrd_reg_fin, -- HRD 등록 완료
    slack_join, -- 슬랙가입완료
    precamp_join, -- 사전캠프 참여
    reg_fin, -- HRD등록완료
    cancel_app, -- 지원 철회
    -- case 
    --     when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
    --     when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
    --     when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
    --     when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
    --     when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    -- else '34세이상'
    -- end as age_category,
    -- interview_pass,
    -- round_title,
    -- u.marketing,
    dva.updatedat as 수정일시
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id    
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'
and first_paper_fin is not null
and round_name is not null
