original_query:
WITH applicant_merge AS (
    SELECT 
        app.*,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS user_name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS user_phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        app.user.email::varchar AS user_email,
        app.funnel.title::varchar AS "상태",
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') END AS reference,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail') END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '[ ]?[0-9]+(회차)?$', '')
        END AS round_title,
        CASE
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS mrt,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '[0-9]+') || '회차'
        END AS round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), '_id') END AS round_id,
        CASE WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'startdate')::timestamp END AS round_start_date,
        CASE WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'enddate')::timestamp END AS round_end_date,
        CASE WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'enrollstartdate')::timestamp END AS round_enrollstartdate,
        CASE WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'enrollenddate')::timestamp END AS round_enrollenddate,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') END AS currentOccupation,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') END AS programmingLevel,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') END AS sameMajor,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') END AS goaltoachieve,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'designlevel') END AS designlevel,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'whatyouexpect') END AS whatyouexpect,
        CASE WHEN app.apl2 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl2), 'purpose') END AS purpose,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN '' ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app_logs.createdat AS "퍼널생성일시",
        CASE WHEN app_logs.afterfunnel IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') END AS after_title,
        CASE WHEN app_logs.beforefunnel IS NULL THEN '' ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') END AS before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
        ON app._id = app_logs.applicantid 
),
applicant_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        online_user_id,
        round_id,
        round_title,
        mrt,
        round_number,
        MAX(user_name) AS user_name,
        MAX(user_email) AS user_email,
        MAX(birthday) AS birthday,
        MAX(CASE WHEN birthday = '' THEN 0 ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END) AS real_age,
        MAX(createdat) AS applicant_date,
        MAX(user_phone) AS phone,
        MAX(has_card) AS has_card_yn,
        MAX("상태") AS "상태",
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전 알림 신청 완료' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS 사전알림신청일시,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN "퍼널생성일시" END) AS final_join,
        MAX(round_enrollstartdate) AS round_enrollstartdate,
        MAX(round_enrollenddate) AS round_enrollenddate
    FROM applicant_merge
    WHERE user_name NOT LIKE '%test%'
      AND user_name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
      AND user_email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
      AND user_email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
),
summary_by_round AS (
    SELECT 
        agg.round_title,
        CASE
            when mrt is null then null
            when mrt like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
            when mrt like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
            when mrt like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
            when mrt like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
            when mrt like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
            when mrt like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
            when mrt like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
            when mrt like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
            when mrt like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when mrt like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when mrt like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when mrt like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
            when mrt like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
            when mrt like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
            when mrt like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
            when mrt like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
            when mrt like '%데이터%' then 'data'
            when mrt like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
            when mrt like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
            when mrt like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
            when mrt like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
            when mrt like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
            when mrt like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
            ELSE agg.round_title
        END AS marketing_round_title,
        round_number,
        MIN(round_enrollstartdate) AS 모집시작일,
        MAX(round_enrollenddate) AS 운영시작일,
        COUNT(*) AS notification_lead_count,
        COUNT(first_paper_fin) AS first_paper_fin_count,
        COUNT(first_paper_fin) AS first_alive,
        COUNT(second_paper_fin) AS second_paper_fin_count,
        COUNT(second_paper_fin) AS second_alive,
        COUNT(paper_pass) AS paper_pass_count,
        COUNT(paper_pass) AS paper_alive,
        COUNT(wait_purchase) AS wait_purchase_count,
        COUNT(wait_purchase) AS wait_purchase_alive,
        COUNT(wait_card) AS wait_card_count,
        COUNT(wait_card) AS wait_card_alive,
        COUNT(purchase_completed) AS purchase_completed_count,
        COUNT(purchase_completed) AS purchase_alive,
        COUNT(final_join) AS final_join_count,
        COUNT(final_join) AS final_alive,
        0 AS 전체모집기간_이탈,
        COUNT(final_join) AS 총_결제자,
        MAX(c.pricepercustomer) AS 객단가,
        COUNT(final_join) * MAX(c.pricepercustomer) AS 총_매출
    FROM applicant_agg agg
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds r ON agg.round_id = r._id
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_courses c ON r.courseid = c._id
    WHERE 
      사전알림신청일시 IS NOT NULL
      AND real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35
    --   and agg.round_title IS NOT NULL 
    GROUP BY agg.round_title, marketing_round_title, round_number
)

SELECT *
FROM summary_by_round
ORDER BY 모집시작일;

            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
            when mrt like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
            when mrt like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
            when mrt like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
            when mrt like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
            ELSE agg.round_title
        END AS marketing_round_title,
        round_number,
        MIN(round_enrollstartdate) AS 모집시작일,
        MAX(round_enrollenddate) AS 운영시작일,
        COUNT(*) AS notification_lead_count,
        COUNT(first_paper_fin) AS first_paper_fin_count,
        COUNT(first_paper_fin) AS first_alive,
        COUNT(second_paper_fin) AS second_paper_fin_count,
        COUNT(second_paper_fin) AS second_alive,
        COUNT(paper_pass) AS paper_pass_count,
        COUNT(paper_pass) AS paper_alive,
        COUNT(wait_purchase) AS wait_purchase_count,
        COUNT(wait_purchase) AS wait_purchase_alive,
        COUNT(wait_card) AS wait_card_count,
        COUNT(wait_card) AS wait_card_alive,
        COUNT(purchase_completed) AS purchase_completed_count,
        COUNT(purchase_completed) AS purchase_alive,
        COUNT(final_join) AS final_join_count,
        COUNT(final_join) AS final_alive,
        0 AS 전체모집기간_이탈,
        COUNT(final_join) AS 총_결제자,
        MAX(c.pricepercustomer) AS 객단가,
        COUNT(final_join) * MAX(c.pricepercustomer) AS 총_매출
    FROM applicant_agg agg
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds r ON agg.round_id = r._id
    LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_courses c ON r.courseid = c._id
    WHERE 
      사전알림신청일시 IS NOT NULL
      AND real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35
    --   and agg.round_title IS NOT NULL 
    GROUP BY agg.round_title, marketing_round_title, round_number
)

SELECT *
FROM summary_by_round
ORDER BY 모집시작일;

WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전 알림 신청 완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS notification_lead,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        CASE 
            WHEN birthday = '' THEN 0
            ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 
        END AS real_age,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '[ ]?[0-9]+(회차)?$', '')
        END AS round_title,
        CASE
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS mrt,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '[0-9]+') || '회차'
        END AS round_number,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), '_id')
        END AS round_id
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),
final AS (
    SELECT 
        round_title,
        case
            when mrt is null then null
            when mrt like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
            when mrt like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
            when mrt like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
            when mrt like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
            when mrt like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
            when mrt like '%마케터%' then 'data_marketer'
            when mrt like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
            when mrt like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
            when mrt like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when mrt like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when mrt like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when mrt like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
            when mrt like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
            when mrt like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
            when mrt like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
            when mrt like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
            when mrt like '%데이터%' then 'data'
            when mrt like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
            when mrt like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
            when mrt like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
            when mrt like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
            when mrt like '%Unreal%' then 'game_unreal'
            when mrt like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
            when mrt like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
            else round_title
        end as marketing_round_title,
        round_number,
        TO_DATE(nbc_r.enrollstartdate, 'yyyy/mm/dd') AS 모집시작일,
        TO_DATE(nbc_r.startdate, 'yyyy/mm/dd') AS 운영개강일,
        -- COUNT(notification_lead) AS notification_lead_count,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35 THEN first_paper_fin END) AS first_paper_fin_count,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35 THEN first_paper_fin END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN first_paper_fin IS NOT NULL AND second_paper_fin IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35 THEN cancel_app END) AS first_alive,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35 THEN second_paper_fin END) AS second_paper_fin_count,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35 THEN second_paper_fin END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN second_paper_fin IS NOT NULL AND paper_pass IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND real_age BETWEEN 20 AND 35 THEN cancel_app END) AS second_alive,
        COUNT(paper_pass) AS paper_pass_count,
        COUNT(paper_pass) - COUNT(CASE WHEN paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND wait_purchase IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL THEN cancel_app END) AS paper_alive,
        COUNT(wait_purchase) AS wait_purchase_count,
        COUNT(wait_purchase) - COUNT(CASE WHEN wait_purchase IS NOT NULL AND wait_card IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL THEN cancel_app END) AS wait_purchase_alive,
        COUNT(wait_card) AS wait_card_count,
        COUNT(wait_card) - COUNT(CASE WHEN wait_card IS NOT NULL AND purchase_completed IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL THEN cancel_app END) AS wait_card_alive,
        COUNT(purchase_completed) AS purchase_completed_count,
        COUNT(purchase_completed) - COUNT(CASE WHEN purchase_completed IS NOT NULL AND final_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL THEN cancel_app END) AS purchase_alive,
        COUNT(final_join) AS final_join_count,
        COUNT(final_join) - COUNT(CASE WHEN final_join IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL THEN cancel_app END) AS final_alive,
        COUNT(IMC_fin) as nonbau_2025imc,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN final_join IS NOT NULL 
            AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL 
            AND TO_DATE(cancel_app, 'yyyy/mm/dd') BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days') 
            AND TO_DATE(final_join, 'yyyy/mm/dd') <= TO_DATE(cancel_app, 'yyyy/mm/dd') THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS 전체모집기간_이탈,
        (final_join_count - 전체모집기간_이탈) AS 총_결제자,
        pricepercustomer as 객단가,
        총_결제자 * nbc_c.pricepercustomer AS 총_매출
    FROM user_info u_i
    INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
        ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds nbc_r 
        ON u_i.round_id = nbc_r._id
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_courses nbc_c
        ON nbc_r.courseid = nbc_c._id 
    WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
        AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
        AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
        AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
        AND (first_paper_fin >= '2023/01/01' or IMC_fin is not null)
        AND round_title != ''
        AND round_title NOT LIKE '%미정%'
    GROUP BY round_title, mrt, round_number, nbc_r.startdate, nbc_r.enrollstartdate, nbc_c.pricepercustomer
    ORDER BY 1, 2 , 3
)
SELECT 
    f.*
FROM final f
ORDER BY 모집시작일;

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_request,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when title = '최종합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as purchase_completed,
        max(case when title = '최종합류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as final_join
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title') 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '....$'),1) = 1
                then REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '....$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '...$')
        end as round_number,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
    -- where round_title = 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 9회차'
)
select
    u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    u_i.email::varchar,
    degree,
    -- reference,
    -- referenceDetail,
    has_card,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%제작%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터 분석가%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QAQC'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'pm'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    -- app_start, -- 지원 시작
    first_paper_fin, -- 1차 서류 완료
    second_paper_fin, -- 2차 서류 완료
    paper_pass, -- 서류 합격
    -- paper_wait, -- 서류 보류
    paper_fail, -- 서류 불합격
    -- call_interview, -- 전화 인터뷰
    -- interview_fin, -- 영상 인터뷰 완료
    -- interview_pass, -- 영상 인터뷰 합격
    -- interview_fail, -- 영상 인터뷰 불합격
    -- hrd_reg_fin, -- HRD 등록 완료
    slack_join, -- 슬랙가입완료
    -- reg_fin, -- HRD등록완료
    purchase_completed, -- 최종합격
    final_join, -- 최종합류
    cancel_request, -- 지원철회 요청
    cancel_app, -- 지원 철회
    dva.precampjoininfo.canattend, -- 사전캠프 참여 여부

    dva.updatedat as 수정일시
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id    
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- -- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'
and first_paper_fin is not null
and round_name is not null

-- -- 모집 트랙 아래 리스트업 (last : 2025-03-14)

AND
    ((round_name='Game' and round_number='9회차')
    or (round_name='Game' and round_number='10회차')
    or (round_name='kotlin' and round_number='6회차')
    or (round_name='kotlin' and round_number='7회차')
    or (round_name='data' and round_number='7회차')
    or (round_name='data' and round_number='8회차')
    or (round_name like '%APP%' and round_number='6회차')
    or (round_name='pm' and round_number='2회차')
    or (round_name='UXUI' and round_number='7회차')
    or (round_name='APP(iOS)' and round_number='7회차')
    or (round_name='APP(Android)' and round_number='7회차'))

order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') AS title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '서류합격'   THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '슬랙가입완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS slack_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = 'HRD등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '최종합류'    THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS reg_fin_,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '최종합류 D1' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS reg_fin_D1,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '지원철회 요청' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name')  AS name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'email') AS email,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        CASE 
            WHEN birthday = '' THEN 0
            ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 
        END AS real_age,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS round_title,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(
            REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '[0-9]+회차'),
            '[0-9]+'
         )
        END AS round_number,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), '_id')
        END AS round_id
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
    WHERE NOT (
        LOWER(COALESCE(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name'), ''))  LIKE '%test%'
        OR LOWER(COALESCE(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'email'), '')) LIKE '%test%'
        OR COALESCE(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name'), '')  LIKE '%테스트%'
        OR COALESCE(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'email'), '') LIKE '%테스트%'
    )
),
final AS (
    SELECT 
        round_title,
        CASE
            WHEN round_title IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %'         THEN 'APP(iOS)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %'     THEN 'APP(Android)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %'                    THEN 'APP(Android)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %'     THEN 'Game'
            WHEN round_title LIKE '%프론트엔드%'                              THEN 'WEB(React)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE '%스프링%'                                  THEN 'WEB(Spring)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %%' THEN 'WEB(Node)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %'         THEN 'AI'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %'         THEN 'data'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %'       THEN 'UXUI'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' THEN 'kotlin'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %'  THEN 'Unreal'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' THEN 'QAQC'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' THEN 'PM'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' THEN 'design'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' THEN 'marketer'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' THEN 'spring'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' THEN 'advanced-java'
        END AS round_name,
        round_number,
        nbc_r.enrollstartdate   AS 모집시작일,
        nbc_r.preCampStartDate  AS 사전캠프_개강일,
        nbc_r.startdate         AS 운영개강일,

        SUM(
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_결제자수,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL 
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.startdate - INTERVAL '1 day')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_개강전_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.preCampStartDate - INTERVAL '1 day')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 사전캠프_이전_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.preCampStartDate AND (nbc_r.startdate - INTERVAL '1 day')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 사전캠프기간_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_개강주차_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_), 'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_) IS NOT NULL
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 개강주차_신규유입_결제인원수_결제기준,

        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_), 'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_), 'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 개강주차_신규유입_이탈_결제기준
    FROM user_info u_i
    JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid
    JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds nbc_r     ON u_i.round_id = nbc_r._id
    GROUP BY 1,2,3, nbc_r.enrollstartdate, nbc_r.preCampStartDate, nbc_r.startdate
)
SELECT 
    f.*,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.전체모집기간_이탈,0)          *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 전체모집기간_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.전체모집기간_개강전_이탈,0)   *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 개강전_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.사전캠프_이전_이탈,0)         *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 사전캠프_이전_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.사전캠프기간_이탈,0)          *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 사전캠프기간_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.전체모집기간_개강주차_이탈,0) *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 개강주차_이탈률
FROM final f
WHERE f.전체모집기간_결제자수 != 0
ORDER BY 모집시작일 DESC;
optimized_query:
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR AS title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '서류합격'   THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '슬랙가입완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS slack_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = 'HRD등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '최종합류'    THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS reg_fin_,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '최종합류 D1' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS reg_fin_D1,
        MAX(CASE WHEN title = '지원철회 요청' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        _id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR  AS name,
        app.user.email::VARCHAR AS email,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR AS birthday,
        CASE 
            WHEN birthday = '' THEN 0
            ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 
        END AS real_age,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE app.round.title::VARCHAR
        END AS round_title,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(
            REGEXP_SUBSTR(app.round.title::VARCHAR, '[0-9]+회차'),
            '[0-9]+'
         )
        END AS round_number,
        CASE
            WHEN app.round IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE app.round._id::VARCHAR
        END AS round_id
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
    WHERE NOT (
        LOWER(COALESCE(app.user.name::VARCHAR, ''))  LIKE '%test%'
        OR LOWER(COALESCE(app.user.email::VARCHAR, '')) LIKE '%test%'
        OR COALESCE(app.user.name::VARCHAR, '')  LIKE '%테스트%'
        OR COALESCE(app.user.email::VARCHAR, '') LIKE '%테스트%'
    )
),
final AS (
    SELECT 
        round_title,
        CASE
            WHEN round_title IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %'         THEN 'APP(iOS)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %'     THEN 'APP(Android)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %'                    THEN 'APP(Android)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %'     THEN 'Game'
            WHEN round_title LIKE '%프론트엔드%'                              THEN 'WEB(React)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE '%스프링%'                                  THEN 'WEB(Spring)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %%' THEN 'WEB(Node)'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %'         THEN 'AI'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %'         THEN 'data'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %'       THEN 'UXUI'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' THEN 'kotlin'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %'  THEN 'Unreal'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' THEN 'QAQC'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' THEN 'PM'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' THEN 'design'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' THEN 'marketer'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' THEN 'spring'
            WHEN round_title LIKE 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' THEN 'advanced-java'
        END AS round_name,
        round_number,
        nbc_r.enrollstartdate   AS 모집시작일,
        nbc_r.preCampStartDate  AS 사전캠프_개강일,
        nbc_r.startdate         AS 운영개강일,

        SUM(
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_결제자수,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL 
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.startdate - INTERVAL '1 day')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_개강전_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.enrollstartdate AND (nbc_r.preCampStartDate - INTERVAL '1 day')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 사전캠프_이전_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.preCampStartDate AND (nbc_r.startdate - INTERVAL '1 day')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 사전캠프기간_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1) IS NOT NULL
                  AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_, reg_fin_D1),'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                      <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 전체모집기간_개강주차_이탈,

        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_), 'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_) IS NOT NULL
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 개강주차_신규유입_결제인원수_결제기준,

        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_), 'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       BETWEEN nbc_r.startdate AND (nbc_r.startdate + INTERVAL '7 days')
                  AND TO_DATE(COALESCE(reg_fin, reg_fin_), 'yyyy/mm/dd') 
                       <= TO_DATE(cancel_app,'yyyy/mm/dd')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        ) AS 개강주차_신규유입_이탈_결제기준
    FROM user_info u_i
    JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid
    JOIN dbnbcamp_rounds nbc_r     ON u_i.round_id = nbc_r._id
    GROUP BY 1,2,3, nbc_r.enrollstartdate, nbc_r.preCampStartDate, nbc_r.startdate
)
SELECT 
    f.*,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.전체모집기간_이탈,0)          *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 전체모집기간_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.전체모집기간_개강전_이탈,0)   *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 개강전_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.사전캠프_이전_이탈,0)         *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 사전캠프_이전_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.사전캠프기간_이탈,0)          *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 사전캠프기간_이탈률,
    ROUND((COALESCE(f.전체모집기간_개강주차_이탈,0) *100.0) / NULLIF(f.전체모집기간_결제자수,0),2) AS 개강주차_이탈률
FROM final f
WHERE f.전체모집기간_결제자수 != 0
ORDER BY 모집시작일 DESC;

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_request,
        max(case when title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title') 
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when app.round is null then ''
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title'), '...$')
        end as round_number,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)
select
    u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    u_i.email::varchar,
    degree,
    -- reference,
    -- referenceDetail,
    has_card,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%제작%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%화이트해커%' then 'HACKER'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%빅데이터%' then 'QA'
        when round_title like '%데이터드리븐%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    -- app_start, -- 지원 시작
    first_paper_fin, -- 1차 서류 완료
    second_paper_fin, -- 2차 서류 완료
    paper_pass, -- 서류 합격
    paper_wait, -- 서류 보류
    paper_fail, -- 서류 불합격
    -- call_interview, -- 전화 인터뷰
    -- interview_fin, -- 영상 인터뷰 완료
    -- interview_pass, -- 영상 인터뷰 합격
    -- interview_fail, -- 영상 인터뷰 불합격
    -- hrd_reg_fin, -- HRD 등록 완료
    slack_join, -- 슬랙가입완료
    reg_fin, -- HRD등록완료
    cancel_request, -- 지원철회 요청
    cancel_app, -- 지원 철회
    dva.precampjoininfo.canattend, -- 사전캠프 참여 여부

    dva.updatedat as 수정일시
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id    
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'
and first_paper_fin is not null
and round_name is not null

-- 모집 트랙 아래 리스트업 (last : 2023-11-27)

AND
    (
        (round_name='data' and round_number='1회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='2회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='3회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='4회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='5회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='6회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='7회차')
    )

order by first_paper_fin

    u_i.email::varchar,
    degree,
    -- reference,
    -- referenceDetail,
    has_card,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%iOS%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%제작%' then 'APP(Android)'
        when round_title like '%Unreal%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%화이트해커%' then 'HACKER'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%AI%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%빅데이터%' then 'QA'
        when round_title like '%데이터드리븐%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'kotlin'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    -- app_start, -- 지원 시작
    first_paper_fin, -- 1차 서류 완료
    second_paper_fin, -- 2차 서류 완료
    paper_pass, -- 서류 합격
    paper_wait, -- 서류 보류
    paper_fail, -- 서류 불합격
    -- call_interview, -- 전화 인터뷰
    -- interview_fin, -- 영상 인터뷰 완료
    -- interview_pass, -- 영상 인터뷰 합격
    -- interview_fail, -- 영상 인터뷰 불합격
    -- hrd_reg_fin, -- HRD 등록 완료
    slack_join, -- 슬랙가입완료
    reg_fin, -- HRD등록완료
    cancel_request, -- 지원철회 요청
    cancel_app, -- 지원 철회
    dva.precampjoininfo.canattend, -- 사전캠프 참여 여부

    dva.updatedat as 수정일시
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
inner join dbonline_v2_users u
    on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    on u_i._id = dva._id    
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
-- and u_i.degree not like '%스파르타%'
and first_paper_fin is not null
and round_name is not null

-- 모집 트랙 아래 리스트업 (last : 2023-11-27)

AND
    (
        (round_name='data' and round_number='1회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='2회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='3회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='4회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='5회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='6회차')
        or (round_name='data' and round_number='7회차')
    )

order by first_paper_fin

original_query:
-- funnel 단계 추출
WITH raw_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') AS after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),

-- applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs AS (
    SELECT
        applicantid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '1차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS first_paper_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '2차서류완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS second_paper_fin,
        MAX(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_pass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '서류불합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS paper_fail,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '지원철회' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS cancel_app
        -- MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    FROM raw_funnel_logs
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1
),
user_info AS (
    SELECT
        app._id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') AS online_user_id,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') AS name,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') AS birthday,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') AS phone,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') AS degree,
        JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') AS has_card,
        CASE 
            WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        END AS reference,
        CASE 
            WHEN reference = '기타' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            ELSE '' 
        END AS referenceDetail,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE marketingroundtitle
        END AS round_title,
        CASE 
            WHEN marketingroundtitle IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
        END AS round_number,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        CASE WHEN app.apl1 IS NULL THEN ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'goaltoachieve') end as goalToAchieve,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'painpoint') end as painPoint,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'needs') end as needs,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        ELSE app.user.recentorder.course_title END AS recentOrder,
        app.user.email AS email,
        case when app.apl2 is null then ''
        else app.apl2.purpose end as motivation
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants app
),
notification AS (
    SELECT 
        app._id,
        u.name,
        u.phone,
        u.birthyear,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.funnel), 'title')
        END AS funnel_title,
        CASE WHEN app.funnel IS NULL THEN ''
            ELSE JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.round), 'title')
        END AS notification_round_title
    FROM dbonline_v2_users u 
    INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants app 
    ON app.user.onlineuserid = u._id
    WHERE whynotification IS NOT NULL
),
sales_info AS (
    SELECT
        createdat,
        marketingroundtitle,
        name,
        phone,
        roundtitle,
        track
    FROM dbnbcamp_nbcamp_sales_2025
    where createdat >= '2025/04/13'
    AND roundtitle like '%iOS%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
    AND name NOT LIKE '%test%'
)

SELECT
    u_i.name,
    u_i._id AS onlineUserId,
    CASE WHEN u_i.birthday = '' THEN 0
    ELSE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::INT + 1 END AS real_age,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    u_i.phone,
    s.phone AS sales_phone,
    has_card,
    u.marketing,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    round_number,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar AS 상태,
    u_i.motivation,
    currentOccupation,
    programminglevel,
    painPoint,
    needs,
    goalToAchieve,
    sameMajor,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_fail,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    cancel_app,
    -- IMC_fin,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_카테고리,
    CASE 
        WHEN withdrawalrequest IS NOT NULL THEN withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
        ELSE ''
    END AS 지원철회_상세,
    CASE 
        WHEN (paper_pass IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '서합후지원철회'
        WHEN (purchase_completed IS NOT NULL AND final_join IS NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL) THEN '최종합격후지원철회'
        WHEN (final_join IS NOT NULL AND cancel_app IS NOT NULL AND final_join <= cancel_app) THEN '최종합류후지원철회'
    ELSE ''
    END AS funnel_to_cancel_app,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    s.createdat AS sales_createdat,
    s.marketingroundtitle AS sales_marketingroundtitle,
    s.name AS sales_name,
    s.roundtitle AS sales_roundtitle,
    s.track AS sales_track,
    'https://h99backoffice.spartacodingclub.kr/nbcamp/applicant/' || u_i._id AS 백오피스_링크
FROM user_info u_i
INNER JOIN user_funnel_logs uf_logs 
    ON u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid 
INNER JOIN dbonline_v2_users u
    ON u_i.online_user_id = u._id
INNER JOIN dbnbcamp_applicants dva
    ON u_i._id = dva._id
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc
    ON dva._id = oc.applicantid
LEFT JOIN dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om
    ON oc.managerid = om._id
LEFT JOIN sales_info s
    ON u_i.phone = s.phone
    
WHERE u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%@test@%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%테스트%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
AND u_i.name NOT LIKE '%test%'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@test.com'
AND u_i.email NOT LIKE '%@teamsparta.co'
AND round_name IN ('ios_master')
AND round_number IN ('7회차')
AND (first_paper_fin >= '2025/03/31') -- or IMC_fin is not null)
AND COALESCE(dva.funnel.title, '') != '무효화'
ORDER BY first_paper_fin;

original_query:
with users as (-- funnel 단계 추출 + index 번호 (최신 데이터 = 1)
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title,
        row_number() over (partition by applicantid order by createdat desc) as rn
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
-- 수강생 정보 취합
user_info as (
    select
        app._id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$'),1) = ' ' then REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title::varchar end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email::varchar as email,
        app.round,
        row_number() over (partition by json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') order by app.createdat desc) as apl_number,
        app.usertype,
        case
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend is null then '미제출'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = true then '참여'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = false then '미참여'
            else 'error'
        end as precamp_join,
        app.precampjoininfo.rejectreason::varchar as precamp_reject,
        case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
            when rnd.title is null then null
            when rnd.title like '앱 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like '웹개발 엔지니어 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'AI/클라우드/게임 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' then 'QAQC'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' then 'PM'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %' then 'data'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 스프링 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 클라우드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'cloud'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(iOS)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'kotlin'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Nodejs 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Game'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %' then 'UXUI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' then 'marketer'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' then 'advanced-java'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
        end as track_title,
        case 
            when rnd.title is null then ''
            when track_title = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            when track_title = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            -- when track_title = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$')
        end as track_number
        
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
    left join dbnbcamp_rounds rnd
        on app.round._id = rnd._id
    
    
    where usertype is null 
        -- and not name like '%테스트%'
        -- and not name like '%test%'
        -- and apl2 is not null
        
),
--enrolled 기준으로 정보 취합

        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'

        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'

            and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
    end as round_track,

        when rnd.title is null then ''
        when round_track = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
        when round_track = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
        when round_track = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
            and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
        when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')

from dbnbcamp_enrolleds enrolled
