-- where enrolled.isregistered != false

)

select
-- id 정보
    user_info._id as applicant_id,
    user_info.online_user_id,
    -- enrolled._id as enrolled_id,
    -- enrolled.roundid as round_id,
    user_info.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    -- enrolled.roundclassid as class_id,
    
-- 수강생 정보
    user_info.name,
    user_info.birthday,
    user_info.phone,
    user_info.email,
    user_info.currentoccupation,
    user_info.programminglevel,
    user_info.samemajor,
-- 지원 정보
    user_info.round_title,
    user_info.round_number,
    -- funnel_log.after_title,
    -- funnel_log.createdat,
    case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '고용센터 검토중' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합격' then '최종합류'
        else funnel_log.after_title
    end as funnel,
    date(case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then funnel_log.createdat - 1
        else funnel_log.createdat
    end) as funnel_date,
    logs.final_join as join_date,
    
    -- 지원 철회 여부 (true : 철회 X / false : 철회 O)
    -- enrolled.isregistered,
    -- 중도 하차 여부 (true : 하차 X / false : 하차 O)
    -- enrolled.isnotdroppedout,
    user_info.track_title,
    user_info.track_number,
    
    -- 중복 확인
    -- funnel_log.rn,
    -- user_info.apl_number
-- 사전캠프 정보
    user_info.precamp_join,
    user_info.precamp_reject
    
-- 지원 정보
from user_info

-- 퍼널 정보
left join raw_funnel_logs funnel_log
    on user_info._id = funnel_log.applicantid
    
-- 최종 합류 정보
-- left join enrolled
--     on user_info.online_user_id = enrolled.onlineuserid
--         and user_info.round._id = enrolled.roundid

-- 퍼널 정보2
left join user_funnel_logs logs
    on user_info._id = logs.applicantid

-- 필터링 조건 (기본 : 최신 퍼널 정보 + 최신 합류 정보)
where funnel_log.rn = 1 
    -- and (enrolled.row_number = 1 or enrolled.row_number is null)
    and logs.final_join is not null
    
    -- 트랙 조건
    -- and round_id in ('67184dfdaebc52e4bd3eb112', '6724486a0c25d9610854e997', '66583d7ead1c2cea90df6226', '66583d47bc6871a1b0a3db8b', '66f60ec6647e3ab5d097e66f')
    and (
    (track_title = 'design' and track_number = '3회차')
    or (track_title = 'APP(iOS)' and track_number = '9회차')
    or (track_title = 'spring' and track_number = '3회차')
    or (track_title = 'Game' and track_number = '12회차')
    
    -- or (track_title = '' and track_number = '')
    )
    
    -- and (enrolled.isregistered != false and enrolled.isnotdroppedout != false)
    -- and enrolled.isregistered is not null
    
    and funnel in ('최종합류', '최종합류 D1', '지원철회', '지원철회 요청', 'HRD등록완료', '고용센터 검토중')
    -- and user_info.name = '박지환'
    

order by createdat desc
-- limit 1000



), attre_raw as (
    select
        user_id,
        DATE(created_at) as ymd,
        max(case when rtype = '입실' then created_at else null end) as checkin,
        max(case when rtype = '퇴실' then created_at else null end) as checkoutt,
        avg(case when rtype = '외출' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as outing,
        avg(case when rtype = '복귀' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as comeback,
        max(case when rtype = '중간점검' then created_at else null end) as savetime,
        case 
            when checkoutt is null then savetime
            when checkoutt is not null then checkoutt 
        else null 
        end as checkout
    from dbonline_v2_gov_attend_records
    Group by 1,2
),

user_attendance as (
select
    nbcap.user.onlineuserid::varchar as _id,
    -- nbcap.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    ar.ymd as "date",
    ar.checkin as check_in,
    ar.checkout as check_out,
    -- ar.checkout - ar.checkin as check,
    -- CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) as outing,
    case 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is null 
            then ar.checkout - ar.checkin 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is not null 
            then (ar.checkout - ar.checkin) - CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) 
    end as attendance,
    case
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석'
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
        when attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석' 
        when attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
    else '결석' end as status
    -- nbcap.funnel.title as ft,
    -- nbcap.user,
    -- nbcap.usertype

from attre_raw ar

left join dbnbcamp_applicants nbcap
    on nbcap.user.onlineuserid = ar.user_id
),
-- QR 출결정보
user_attendance_qr as (
select
    distinct
    en.onlineuserid as _id,
    DATE(date) as "date",
    case
        when qr.enteredtime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.enteredtime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.enteredtime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_in,
    case
        when qr.lefttime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.lefttime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.lefttime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_out,
    check_out - check_in as attendance,
    qr.attendancestatus as status
    
from dbnbcamp_qr_daily_records qr
left join dbnbcamp_enrolleds en
    on qr.enrolledid = en._id

where qr.enteredtime is not null or qr.lefttime is not null
),

user_at as (select *

from user_attendance
union select * from user_attendance_qr
)

select
    distinct
    -- users.enrolled_id,
    users.online_user_id,
    users.round_id,
    user_at.date,
    user_at.check_in,
    user_at.check_out,
    -- user_at.outing,
    user_at.attendance,
    -- user_at.status
    users.round_title,
    users.track_title,
    users.track_number,
    users.precamp_join
    
from user_attendance user_at

left join users
    on user_at._id = users.online_user_id

where check_in is not null 
    and online_user_id is not null    
    -- and enrolled_id is not null

order by check_in desc
optimized_query:
with users as (-- funnel 단계 추출 + index 번호 (최신 데이터 = 1)
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR as after_title,
        app_logs.beforefunnel.title::VARCHAR as before_title,
        row_number() over (partition by applicantid order by createdat desc) as rn
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
-- 수강생 정보 취합
user_info as (
    select
        app._id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR as online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR as name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR as birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR as phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR as degree,
        app.user.hascard::VARCHAR as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then app.apl1.referencedetail::VARCHAR
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$'),1) = ' ' then REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.currentoccupation::VARCHAR end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.programminglevel::VARCHAR end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.samemajor::VARCHAR end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title::varchar end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email::varchar as email,
        app.round,
        row_number() over (partition by app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR order by app.createdat desc) as apl_number,
        app.usertype,
        case
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend is null then '미제출'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = true then '참여'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = false then '미참여'
            else 'error'
        end as precamp_join,
        app.precampjoininfo.rejectreason::varchar as precamp_reject,
        case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
            when rnd.title is null then null
            when rnd.title like '앱 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like '웹개발 엔지니어 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'AI/클라우드/게임 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' then 'QAQC'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' then 'PM'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %' then 'data'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 스프링 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 클라우드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'cloud'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(iOS)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'kotlin'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Nodejs 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Game'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %' then 'UXUI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' then 'marketer'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' then 'advanced-java'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
        end as track_title,
        case 
            when rnd.title is null then ''
            when track_title = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            when track_title = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            -- when track_title = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$')
        end as track_number
        
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
    left join dbnbcamp_rounds rnd
        on app.round._id = rnd._id
    
    
    where usertype is null 
        -- and not name like '%테스트%'
        -- and not name like '%test%'
        -- and apl2 is not null
        
),
--enrolled 기준으로 정보 취합
enrolled as (

select 
    enrolled._id,
    enrolled.onlineuserid,
    enrolled.roundid,
    enrolled.name,
    enrolled.phone,
    enrolled.email,
    enrolled.resno,
    enrolled.isregistered,
    enrolled.isnotdroppedout,
    row_number() over (partition by onlineuserid order by enrolled.createdat desc) as row_number,
    enrolled.roundclassid,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when rnd.title is null then null
        when rnd.title like '앱 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
        when rnd.title like '웹개발 엔지니어 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
        when rnd.title like 'AI/클라우드/게임 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' then 'QAQC'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' then 'PM'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %' then 'data'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 스프링 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 클라우드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'cloud'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'AI'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'kotlin'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Nodejs 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Game'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %' then 'UXUI'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' then 'marketer'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' then 'advanced-java'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
        -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
            and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
    end as round_track,
    case 
        when rnd.title is null then ''
        when round_track = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
        when round_track = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
        when round_track = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
            and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
        when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')
        else REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$')
    end as round_number
    
from dbnbcamp_enrolleds enrolled
left join dbnbcamp_rounds rnd
    on enrolled.roundid = rnd._id

-- where enrolled.isregistered != false

)

select
-- id 정보
    user_info._id as applicant_id,
    user_info.online_user_id,
    -- enrolled._id as enrolled_id,
    -- enrolled.roundid as round_id,
    user_info.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    -- enrolled.roundclassid as class_id,
    
-- 수강생 정보
    user_info.name,
    user_info.birthday,
    user_info.phone,
    user_info.email,
    user_info.currentoccupation,
    user_info.programminglevel,
    user_info.samemajor,
-- 지원 정보
    user_info.round_title,
    user_info.round_number,
    -- funnel_log.after_title,
    -- funnel_log.createdat,
    case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '고용센터 검토중' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합격' then '최종합류'
        else funnel_log.after_title
    end as funnel,
    date(case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then funnel_log.createdat - 1
        else funnel_log.createdat
    end) as funnel_date,
    logs.final_join as join_date,
    
    -- 지원 철회 여부 (true : 철회 X / false : 철회 O)
    -- enrolled.isregistered,
    -- 중도 하차 여부 (true : 하차 X / false : 하차 O)
    -- enrolled.isnotdroppedout,
    user_info.track_title,
    user_info.track_number,
    
    -- 중복 확인
    -- funnel_log.rn,
    -- user_info.apl_number
-- 사전캠프 정보
    user_info.precamp_join,
    user_info.precamp_reject
    
-- 지원 정보
from user_info

-- 퍼널 정보
left join raw_funnel_logs funnel_log
    on user_info._id = funnel_log.applicantid
    
-- 최종 합류 정보
-- left join enrolled
--     on user_info.online_user_id = enrolled.onlineuserid
--         and user_info.round._id = enrolled.roundid

-- 퍼널 정보2
left join user_funnel_logs logs
    on user_info._id = logs.applicantid

-- 필터링 조건 (기본 : 최신 퍼널 정보 + 최신 합류 정보)
where funnel_log.rn = 1 
    -- and (enrolled.row_number = 1 or enrolled.row_number is null)
    and logs.final_join is not null
    
    -- 트랙 조건
    -- and round_id in ('67184dfdaebc52e4bd3eb112', '6724486a0c25d9610854e997', '66583d7ead1c2cea90df6226', '66583d47bc6871a1b0a3db8b', '66f60ec6647e3ab5d097e66f')
    and (
    (track_title = 'design' and track_number = '3회차')
    or (track_title = 'APP(iOS)' and track_number = '9회차')
    or (track_title = 'spring' and track_number = '3회차')
    or (track_title = 'Game' and track_number = '12회차')
    
    -- or (track_title = '' and track_number = '')
    )
    
    -- and (enrolled.isregistered != false and enrolled.isnotdroppedout != false)
    -- and enrolled.isregistered is not null
    
    and funnel in ('최종합류', '최종합류 D1', '지원철회', '지원철회 요청', 'HRD등록완료', '고용센터 검토중')
    -- and user_info.name = '박지환'
    

order by createdat desc
-- limit 1000



), attre_raw as (
    select
        user_id,
        DATE(created_at) as ymd,
        max(case when rtype = '입실' then created_at else null end) as checkin,
        max(case when rtype = '퇴실' then created_at else null end) as checkoutt,
        avg(case when rtype = '외출' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as outing,
        avg(case when rtype = '복귀' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as comeback,
        max(case when rtype = '중간점검' then created_at else null end) as savetime,
        case 
            when checkoutt is null then savetime
            when checkoutt is not null then checkoutt 
        else null 
        end as checkout
    from dbonline_v2_gov_attend_records
    Group by 1,2
),

user_attendance as (
select
    nbcap.user.onlineuserid::varchar as _id,
    -- nbcap.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    ar.ymd as "date",
    ar.checkin as check_in,
    ar.checkout as check_out,
    -- ar.checkout - ar.checkin as check,
    -- CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) as outing,
    case 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is null 
            then ar.checkout - ar.checkin 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is not null 
            then (ar.checkout - ar.checkin) - CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) 
    end as attendance,
    case
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석'
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
        when attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석' 
        when attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
    else '결석' end as status
    -- nbcap.funnel.title as ft,
    -- nbcap.user,
    -- nbcap.usertype

from attre_raw ar

left join dbnbcamp_applicants nbcap
    on nbcap.user.onlineuserid = ar.user_id
),
-- QR 출결정보
user_attendance_qr as (
select
    distinct
    en.onlineuserid as _id,
    DATE(date) as "date",
    case
        when qr.enteredtime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.enteredtime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.enteredtime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_in,
    case
        when qr.lefttime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.lefttime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.lefttime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_out,
    check_out - check_in as attendance,
    qr.attendancestatus as status
    
from dbnbcamp_qr_daily_records qr
left join dbnbcamp_enrolleds en
    on qr.enrolledid = en._id

where qr.enteredtime is not null or qr.lefttime is not null
),

user_at as (select *

from user_attendance
union select * from user_attendance_qr
)

select
    distinct
    -- users.enrolled_id,
    users.online_user_id,
    users.round_id,
    user_at.date,
    user_at.check_in,
    user_at.check_out,
    -- user_at.outing,
    user_at.attendance,
    -- user_at.status
    users.round_title,
    users.track_title,
    users.track_number,
    users.precamp_join
    
from user_attendance user_at

left join users
    on user_at._id = users.online_user_id

where check_in is not null 
    and online_user_id is not null    
    -- and enrolled_id is not null

order by check_in desc

original_query:
with users as (-- funnel 단계 추출 + index 번호 (최신 데이터 = 1)
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title,
        row_number() over (partition by applicantid order by createdat desc) as rn
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
-- 수강생 정보 취합
user_info as (
    select
        app._id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail')
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$'),1) = ' ' then REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title::varchar end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email::varchar as email,
        app.round,
        row_number() over (partition by json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') order by app.createdat desc) as apl_number,
        app.usertype,
        case
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend is null then '미제출'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = true then '참여'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = false then '미참여'
            else 'error'
        end as precamp_join,
        app.precampjoininfo.rejectreason::varchar as precamp_reject,
        case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
            when rnd.title is null then null
            when rnd.title like '앱 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like '웹개발 엔지니어 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'AI/클라우드/게임 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' then 'QAQC'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' then 'PM'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %' then 'data'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 스프링 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 클라우드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'cloud'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(iOS)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'kotlin'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Nodejs 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Game'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %' then 'UXUI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' then 'marketer'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' then 'advanced-java'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
        end as track_title,
        case 
            when rnd.title is null then ''
            when track_title = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            when track_title = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            -- when track_title = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$')
        end as track_number
        
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
    left join dbnbcamp_rounds rnd
        on app.round._id = rnd._id
    
    
    where usertype is null 
        -- and not name like '%테스트%'
        -- and not name like '%test%'
        -- and apl2 is not null
        
),
--enrolled 기준으로 정보 취합
enrolled as (

        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'

        when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
        -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'

)

select
-- id 정보
    user_info._id as applicant_id,
    user_info.online_user_id,
    -- enrolled._id as enrolled_id,
    -- enrolled.roundid as round_id,
    user_info.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    -- enrolled.roundclassid as class_id,
    
-- 수강생 정보
    user_info.name,
    user_info.birthday,
    user_info.phone,
    user_info.email,
    user_info.currentoccupation,
    user_info.programminglevel,
    user_info.samemajor,
-- 지원 정보
    user_info.round_title,
    user_info.round_number,
    -- funnel_log.after_title,
    -- funnel_log.createdat,
    case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '고용센터 검토중' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합격' then '최종합류'
        else funnel_log.after_title
    end as funnel,
    date(case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then funnel_log.createdat - 1
        else funnel_log.createdat
    end) as funnel_date,
    logs.final_join as join_date,
    
    -- 지원 철회 여부 (true : 철회 X / false : 철회 O)
    -- enrolled.isregistered,
    -- 중도 하차 여부 (true : 하차 X / false : 하차 O)
    -- enrolled.isnotdroppedout,
    user_info.track_title,
    user_info.track_number,
    
    -- 중복 확인
    -- funnel_log.rn,
    -- user_info.apl_number
-- 사전캠프 정보
    user_info.precamp_join,
    user_info.precamp_reject
    
-- 지원 정보
from user_info

-- 퍼널 정보
left join raw_funnel_logs funnel_log
    on user_info._id = funnel_log.applicantid
    
-- 최종 합류 정보
-- left join enrolled
--     on user_info.online_user_id = enrolled.onlineuserid
--         and user_info.round._id = enrolled.roundid

-- 퍼널 정보2
left join user_funnel_logs logs
    on user_info._id = logs.applicantid

-- 필터링 조건 (기본 : 최신 퍼널 정보 + 최신 합류 정보)
where funnel_log.rn = 1 
    -- and (enrolled.row_number = 1 or enrolled.row_number is null)
    and logs.final_join is not null
    
    -- 트랙 조건
    -- and round_id in ('67184dfdaebc52e4bd3eb112', '6724486a0c25d9610854e997', '66583d7ead1c2cea90df6226', '66583d47bc6871a1b0a3db8b', '66f60ec6647e3ab5d097e66f')
    and (
    (track_title = 'design' and track_number = '4회차')
    or (track_title = 'marketer' and track_number = '4회차')
    or (track_title = 'QAQC' and track_number = '5회차')
    or (track_title = 'PM' and track_number = '6회차')
    or (track_title = 'spring' and track_number = '4회차')
    or (track_title = 'Unreal' and track_number = '8회차')
    -- or (track_title = '' and track_number = '')
    )
    
    -- and (enrolled.isregistered != false and enrolled.isnotdroppedout != false)
    -- and enrolled.isregistered is not null
    
    and funnel in ('최종합류', '최종합류 D1', '지원철회', '지원철회 요청', 'HRD등록완료', '고용센터 검토중')
    -- and user_info.name = '박지환'
    

order by createdat desc
-- limit 1000



), attre_raw as (
    select
        user_id,
        DATE(created_at) as ymd,
        max(case when rtype = '입실' then created_at else null end) as checkin,
        max(case when rtype = '퇴실' then created_at else null end) as checkoutt,
        avg(case when rtype = '외출' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as outing,
        avg(case when rtype = '복귀' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as comeback,
        max(case when rtype = '중간점검' then created_at else null end) as savetime,
        case 
            when checkoutt is null then savetime
            when checkoutt is not null then checkoutt 
        else null 
        end as checkout
    from dbonline_v2_gov_attend_records
    Group by 1,2
),

user_attendance as (
select
    nbcap.user.onlineuserid::varchar as _id,
    -- nbcap.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    ar.ymd as "date",
    ar.checkin as check_in,
    ar.checkout as check_out,
    -- ar.checkout - ar.checkin as check,
    -- CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) as outing,
    case 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is null 
            then ar.checkout - ar.checkin 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is not null 
            then (ar.checkout - ar.checkin) - CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) 
    end as attendance,
    case
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석'
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
        when attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석' 
        when attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
    else '결석' end as status
    -- nbcap.funnel.title as ft,
    -- nbcap.user,
    -- nbcap.usertype

from attre_raw ar

left join dbnbcamp_applicants nbcap
    on nbcap.user.onlineuserid = ar.user_id
),
-- QR 출결정보
user_attendance_qr as (
select
    distinct
    en.onlineuserid as _id,
    DATE(date) as "date",
    case
        when qr.enteredtime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.enteredtime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.enteredtime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_in,
    case
        when qr.lefttime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.lefttime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.lefttime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_out,
    check_out - check_in as attendance,
    qr.attendancestatus as status
    
from dbnbcamp_qr_daily_records qr
left join dbnbcamp_enrolleds en
    on qr.enrolledid = en._id

where qr.enteredtime is not null or qr.lefttime is not null
),

user_at as (select *

from user_attendance
union select * from user_attendance_qr
)

select
    distinct
    users.applicant_id,
    users.online_user_id,
    users.round_id,
    users.name,
    user_at.date,
    user_at.check_in,
    user_at.check_out,
    -- user_at.outing,
    user_at.attendance,
    -- user_at.status
    users.round_title,
    users.track_title,
    users.track_number,
    users.precamp_join
    
from user_attendance user_at

left join users
    on user_at._id = users.online_user_id

where check_in is not null 
    and online_user_id is not null    
    -- and enrolled_id is not null

order by check_in desc
optimized_query:
with users as (-- funnel 단계 추출 + index 번호 (최신 데이터 = 1)
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        app_logs.afterfunnel.title::VARCHAR as after_title,
        app_logs.beforefunnel.title::VARCHAR as before_title,
        row_number() over (partition by applicantid order by createdat desc) as rn
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
-- 수강생 정보 취합
user_info as (
    select
        app._id,
        app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR as online_user_id,
        app.user.name::VARCHAR as name,
        app.user.birthday::VARCHAR as birthday,
        app.user.phone::VARCHAR as phone,
        app.user.degree::VARCHAR as degree,
        app.user.hascard::VARCHAR as has_card,
        case 
            when app.apl1 is null then ''
            else app.apl1.reference::VARCHAR 
        end as reference,
        case 
            when reference = '기타' then app.apl1.referencedetail::VARCHAR
            else '' 
        end as referenceDetail,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            else marketingroundtitle
        end as round_title,
        case 
            when marketingroundtitle is null then ''
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$'),1) = ' ' then REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '....$')
        end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.currentoccupation::VARCHAR end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.programminglevel::VARCHAR end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.apl1.samemajor::VARCHAR end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then ''
        else app.user.recentorder.course_title::varchar end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email::varchar as email,
        app.round,
        row_number() over (partition by app.user.onlineuserid::VARCHAR order by app.createdat desc) as apl_number,
        app.usertype,
        case
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend is null then '미제출'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = true then '참여'
            when app.precampjoininfo.canattend = false then '미참여'
            else 'error'
        end as precamp_join,
        app.precampjoininfo.rejectreason::varchar as precamp_reject,
        case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
            when rnd.title is null then null
            when rnd.title like '앱 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like '웹개발 엔지니어 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'AI/클라우드/게임 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' then 'QAQC'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' then 'PM'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %' then 'data'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 스프링 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Spring)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 클라우드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'cloud'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(iOS)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'kotlin'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Nodejs 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Game'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %' then 'UXUI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' then 'marketer'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' then 'advanced-java'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
            -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
        end as track_title,
        case 
            when rnd.title is null then ''
            when track_title = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            when track_title = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
            -- when track_title = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
            when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
                and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
            when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')
            else REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$')
        end as track_number
        
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
    left join dbnbcamp_rounds rnd
        on app.round._id = rnd._id
    
    
    where usertype is null 
        -- and not name like '%테스트%'
        -- and not name like '%test%'
        -- and apl2 is not null
        
),
--enrolled 기준으로 정보 취합
enrolled as (

select 
    enrolled._id,
    enrolled.onlineuserid,
    enrolled.roundid,
    enrolled.name,
    enrolled.phone,
    enrolled.email,
    enrolled.resno,
    enrolled.isregistered,
    enrolled.isnotdroppedout,
    row_number() over (partition by onlineuserid order by enrolled.createdat desc) as row_number,
    enrolled.roundclassid,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when rnd.title is null then null
        when rnd.title like '앱 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
        when rnd.title like '웹개발 엔지니어 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
        when rnd.title like 'AI/클라우드/게임 개발자 양성과정(주특기 미정) %' then '미정'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 빅데이터 기반 품질 관리(QA,QC) 양성 과정 %' then 'QAQC'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI를 활용한 데이터드리븐 프로덕트 매니저 양성과정 %' then 'PM'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 데이터 분석가 양성과정 %' then 'data'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 스프링 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 클라우드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'cloud'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 AI 웹 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'AI'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Android 앱개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 iOS 앱 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Kotlin & Spring 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'kotlin'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Node.js 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Nodejs 백엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 Unity 게임개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Game'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 UX/UI 디자이너 양성과정 %' then 'UXUI'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 그래픽 디자이너 양성 과정 %' then 'design'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 생성형 AI 기반 디지털 마케팅 전문가 양성 과정 %' then 'marketer'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실시간 커머스 플랫폼 개발자 양성 과정 %' then 'spring'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형AI웹개발자 %' then 'AI'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' then 'advanced-java'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 앱 제작 실무과정 %' then 'APP(Android)'
        -- when rnd.title like 'KDT C언어 솔루션 기반 화이트해커 양성과정 %' then 'hacker'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT Unreal 기반 3D 게임 개발자 양성과정 %' then 'Unreal'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
            and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then 'PD'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' then 'WEB(React)'
    end as round_track,
    case 
        when rnd.title is null then ''
        when round_track = 'UXUI' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
        when round_track = 'Unreal' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '2회차'  then '1회차'
        when round_track = 'Game' and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$') = '10회차'  then '9회차'
        when rnd.title like 'KDT 실무형 프론트엔드 엔지니어 양성과정 %' 
            and REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$') = '8회차' then '1회차'
        when left(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$'), 1) = ' '  then REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '...$')
        else REGEXP_SUBSTR(rnd.title, '....$')
    end as round_number
    
from dbnbcamp_enrolleds enrolled
left join dbnbcamp_rounds rnd
    on enrolled.roundid = rnd._id

-- where enrolled.isregistered != false

)

select
-- id 정보
    user_info._id as applicant_id,
    user_info.online_user_id,
    -- enrolled._id as enrolled_id,
    -- enrolled.roundid as round_id,
    user_info.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    -- enrolled.roundclassid as class_id,
    
-- 수강생 정보
    user_info.name,
    user_info.birthday,
    user_info.phone,
    user_info.email,
    user_info.currentoccupation,
    user_info.programminglevel,
    user_info.samemajor,
-- 지원 정보
    user_info.round_title,
    user_info.round_number,
    -- funnel_log.after_title,
    -- funnel_log.createdat,
    case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '고용센터 검토중' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then '최종합류'
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합격' then '최종합류'
        else funnel_log.after_title
    end as funnel,
    date(case 
        when funnel_log.after_title = '최종합류 D1' then funnel_log.createdat - 1
        else funnel_log.createdat
    end) as funnel_date,
    logs.final_join as join_date,
    
    -- 지원 철회 여부 (true : 철회 X / false : 철회 O)
    -- enrolled.isregistered,
    -- 중도 하차 여부 (true : 하차 X / false : 하차 O)
    -- enrolled.isnotdroppedout,
    user_info.track_title,
    user_info.track_number,
    
    -- 중복 확인
    -- funnel_log.rn,
    -- user_info.apl_number
-- 사전캠프 정보
    user_info.precamp_join,
    user_info.precamp_reject
    
-- 지원 정보
from user_info

-- 퍼널 정보
left join raw_funnel_logs funnel_log
    on user_info._id = funnel_log.applicantid
    
-- 최종 합류 정보
-- left join enrolled
--     on user_info.online_user_id = enrolled.onlineuserid
--         and user_info.round._id = enrolled.roundid

-- 퍼널 정보2
left join user_funnel_logs logs
    on user_info._id = logs.applicantid

-- 필터링 조건 (기본 : 최신 퍼널 정보 + 최신 합류 정보)
where funnel_log.rn = 1 
    -- and (enrolled.row_number = 1 or enrolled.row_number is null)
    and logs.final_join is not null
    
    -- 트랙 조건
    -- and round_id in ('67184dfdaebc52e4bd3eb112', '6724486a0c25d9610854e997', '66583d7ead1c2cea90df6226', '66583d47bc6871a1b0a3db8b', '66f60ec6647e3ab5d097e66f')
    and (
    (track_title = 'design' and track_number = '4회차')
    or (track_title = 'marketer' and track_number = '4회차')
    or (track_title = 'QAQC' and track_number = '5회차')
    or (track_title = 'PM' and track_number = '6회차')
    or (track_title = 'spring' and track_number = '4회차')
    or (track_title = 'Unreal' and track_number = '8회차')
    -- or (track_title = '' and track_number = '')
    )
    
    -- and (enrolled.isregistered != false and enrolled.isnotdroppedout != false)
    -- and enrolled.isregistered is not null
    
    and funnel in ('최종합류', '최종합류 D1', '지원철회', '지원철회 요청', 'HRD등록완료', '고용센터 검토중')
    -- and user_info.name = '박지환'
    

order by createdat desc
-- limit 1000



), attre_raw as (
    select
        user_id,
        DATE(created_at) as ymd,
        max(case when rtype = '입실' then created_at else null end) as checkin,
        max(case when rtype = '퇴실' then created_at else null end) as checkoutt,
        avg(case when rtype = '외출' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as outing,
        avg(case when rtype = '복귀' then DATEDIFF(s, '1970-01-01', created_at) else null end) as comeback,
        max(case when rtype = '중간점검' then created_at else null end) as savetime,
        case 
            when checkoutt is null then savetime
            when checkoutt is not null then checkoutt 
        else null 
        end as checkout
    from dbonline_v2_gov_attend_records
    Group by 1,2
),

user_attendance as (
select
    nbcap.user.onlineuserid::varchar as _id,
    -- nbcap.round._id::varchar as round_id,
    ar.ymd as "date",
    ar.checkin as check_in,
    ar.checkout as check_out,
    -- ar.checkout - ar.checkin as check,
    -- CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) as outing,
    case 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is null 
            then ar.checkout - ar.checkin 
        when CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) is not null 
            then (ar.checkout - ar.checkin) - CONVERT(TIME, DATEADD(s, ar.comeback - ar.outing, '1970-01-01')) 
    end as attendance,
    case
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석'
        when nbcap.round.title::varchar like 'KDT 심화_AI를 활용한 백엔드 아키텍처 심화 과정 %' and attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
        when attendance > '4:00:00' then '출석' 
        when attendance > '2:00:00' then '미달'
    else '결석' end as status
    -- nbcap.funnel.title as ft,
    -- nbcap.user,
    -- nbcap.usertype

from attre_raw ar

left join dbnbcamp_applicants nbcap
    on nbcap.user.onlineuserid = ar.user_id
),
-- QR 출결정보
user_attendance_qr as (
select
    distinct
    en.onlineuserid as _id,
    DATE(date) as "date",
    case
        when qr.enteredtime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.enteredtime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.enteredtime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_in,
    case
        when qr.lefttime = '0000' then null
        else CAST(DATE(date)::varchar + ' ' + left(qr.lefttime, 2) + ':' + right(qr.lefttime, 2) as datetime)
    end as check_out,
    check_out - check_in as attendance,
    qr.attendancestatus as status
    
from dbnbcamp_qr_daily_records qr
left join dbnbcamp_enrolleds en
    on qr.enrolledid = en._id

where qr.enteredtime is not null or qr.lefttime is not null
),

user_at as (select *

from user_attendance
union select * from user_attendance_qr
)

select
    distinct
    users.applicant_id,
    users.online_user_id,
    users.round_id,
    users.name,
    user_at.date,
    user_at.check_in,
    user_at.check_out,
    -- user_at.outing,
    user_at.attendance,
    -- user_at.status
    users.round_title,
    users.track_title,
    users.track_number,
    users.precamp_join
    
from user_attendance user_at

left join users
    on user_at._id = users.online_user_id

where check_in is not null 
    and online_user_id is not null    
    -- and enrolled_id is not null

order by check_in desc

original_query:
--funnel 단계 추출
with raw_funnel_logs as (
    SELECT 
        app_logs.applicantid,
        createdat,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.afterfunnel), 'title') as after_title,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app_logs.beforefunnel), 'title') as before_title
    FROM dbnbcamp_applicants_logs app_logs
),
--applicantid 기준으로 funnel 취합
user_funnel_logs as (
    select
        applicantid,
        max(case when after_title = '1차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as first_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '2차서류완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as second_paper_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '서류합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '서류보류' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_wait,
        max(case when after_title = '서류불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as paper_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '면접합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_pass,
        max(case when after_title = '슬랙가입완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as slack_join,
        max(case when after_title = '사전캠프 참여' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as precamp_join,
        max(case when after_title = 'HRD등록완료' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as reg_fin,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '면접불합격' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as interview_fail,
        max(case when after_title = '지원철회 요청' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as pre_cancel_app,
        max(case when after_title = '카드 미수령' then to_char(date_trunc('day',createdat),'yyyy/mm/dd') else null end) as no_card_reg_fin,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '고용센터 검토중' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_purchase,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '카드미수령' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS wait_card,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합격' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS purchase_completed,
        MAX(CASE WHEN after_title = '최종합류' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS final_join,
        MAX(CASE WHEN before_title = '사전등록완료' THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd') ELSE NULL END) AS IMC_fin
    from raw_funnel_logs
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
user_info as (
    select
        _id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'onlineuserid') as online_user_id,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'name') as name,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'birthday') as birthday,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'phone') as phone,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'degree') as degree,
        json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.user), 'hascard') as has_card,
        case when app.apl1 is null then '' else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'reference') end as reference,
        case when reference = '기타' then json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'referencedetail') else '' end as referenceDetail,
        case when marketingroundtitle is null then '' else marketingroundtitle end as round_title,
        case when marketingroundtitle is null then '' else REGEXP_SUBSTR(marketingroundtitle, '...$') end as round_number,
        case when app.apl1 is null then '' else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'currentoccupation') end as currentOccupation,
        case when app.apl1 is null then '' else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'programminglevel') end as programmingLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then '' else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'designlevel') end as designLevel,
        case when app.apl1 is null then '' else json_extract_path_text(JSON_SERIALIZE(app.apl1), 'samemajor') end as sameMajor,
        case when app.apl1 is null then '' else app.user.recentorder.course_title end as recentOrder,
        app.user.email as email
    from dbnbcamp_applicants app
)

select
    -- u_i._id as applicantid,
    -- u_i.online_user_id,
    u_i.name,
    case when u_i.birthday = '' then 0
    else extract(year from sysdate) - SUBSTRING(u_i.birthday, 1, 4)::int + 1 end as real_age,
    u_i.phone,
    has_card,
    case
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'ios_starter'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'ios_master'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'flutter_app'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'game_unity'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    designlevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid
inner join dbonline_v2_users u on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
and (first_paper_fin >= '2023/02/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
and round_title like '%UX%'
order by first_paper_fin

        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'data_pm'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced_java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'uxui'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'back_kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'front_react'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'flutter_venture'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'game_unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'data_qaqc'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'data_pm'
        else '미정'
    end as round_name,
    first_paper_fin,
    second_paper_fin,
    paper_pass,
    paper_wait,
    paper_fail,
    slack_join,
    no_card_reg_fin,
    reg_fin,
    cancel_app,
    case 
        when real_age <= 20 then '10대'
        when real_age <= 25 then '25세이하'
        when real_age <= 28 then '28세이하'
        when real_age <= 30 then '30세이하'
        when real_age <= 33 then '33세이하'
    else '34세이상'
    end as age_category,
    dva.funnel.title::varchar as 상태,
    round_number,
    u.marketing,
    currentOccupation,
    designlevel,
    sameMajor,
    reference,
    recentOrder,
    CASE 
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN om.name
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_매니저,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(date_trunc('day', oc.createdat), 'yyyy/mm/dd')
        ELSE ''
    END as 배정_날짜,
    CASE
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is true THEN '회신'
        WHEN oc._id is not null and oc.ispossibleparticipation is false THEN '미회신'
        ELSE '접촉전'
    END as 회신_여부,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalcategory 
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_카테고리,
    -- case 
    --     when withdrawalrequest is not null then withdrawalrequest.withdrawalreason
    --     else ''
    -- end as 지원철회_상세,
    case 
        when (paper_pass is not null and slack_join is null and cancel_app is not null) then '서합후지원철회'
        when (slack_join is not null and reg_fin is null and cancel_app is not null) then '슬랙가입후지원철회'
        when (reg_fin is not null and cancel_app is not null and reg_fin <= cancel_app) then '최종등록후지원철회'
    else ''
    end as funnel_to_cancel_app,
    u.is_bootcamp_blacklist,
    wait_purchase,
    wait_card,
    purchase_completed,
    final_join,
    IMC_fin,
    case -- 트랙 추가 시 아래 구문 추가
        when round_title is null then null
        when round_title like '%스타터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%마스터%' then 'APP(iOS)'
        when round_title like '%Android%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Flutter 앱 개발%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%Unity%' then 'Game'
        when round_title like '%PM%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%프론트엔드%' then 'WEB(React)'
        when round_title like '%스프링%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'WEB(Spring)'
        when round_title like '%Node%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%게임 서버%' then 'WEB(Node)'
        when round_title like '%단기심화 Java 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI를 활용한 백엔드%' then 'advanced-java'
        when round_title like '%AI 웹 개발자%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 서비스 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%AI 개발%' then 'AI'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트 매니저%' then 'PM'
        when round_title like '%데이터%' then 'data'
        when round_title like '%UX%' then 'UXUI'
        when round_title like '%Kotlin%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 3회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 4회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 5회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 부트캠프 6회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%Spring 백엔드 개발 부트캠프 7회차%' then 'Kotlin'
        when round_title like '%프로덕트%' then 'Web(React)'
        when round_title like '%앱 개발 창업%' then 'Flutter'
        when round_title like '%언리얼%' then 'Unreal'
        when round_title like '%QA%' then 'QA/QC'
        
    end as 트랙
from user_info u_i
inner join user_funnel_logs uf_logs on u_i._id = uf_logs.applicantid
inner join dbonline_v2_users u on u_i.online_user_id = u._id
inner join dbnbcamp_applicants dva on u_i._id = dva._id
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_checklists oc on dva._id = oc.applicantid
left join dbnbcamp_onboarding_managers om on oc.managerid = om._id
where u_i.name not like '%@test%'
and u_i.name not like '%test%'
and u_i.name not like '%테스트%'
and u_i.email not like '%@test.com'
and u_i.email not like '%@teamsparta.co'
and (first_paper_fin >= '2023/02/10' or IMC_fin is not null)
and (u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is null or u.is_bootcamp_blacklist is false)
and round_title like '%UX%'
order by first_paper_fin
